title: Ink Inc Tattoo
description: Ink Inc Tattoo is a free online simulation game for boys played on PuzzleGame. In the game, you can experience the satisfaction of a tattoo artist drawing various artistic tattoos for clients. You need to draw the correct lines and colors to complete the image given by the customer. Mobile, Tablet, and Desktop are playable. Come and get a new entertainment experience.

title: Spider Solitaire
description: Get ready to dive into the timeless classic Spider Solitaire, reimagined for mobile with sleek design and intuitive gameplay! Perfect for players of all skill levels, this game offers a relaxing yet challenging card puzzle experience anytime, anywhere.

title: Bubble Shooter Wonders of Egypt
description: Journey into an ancient Egyptian night in Bubble Shooter Pyramid Quest! Match and pop glossy bubbles to climb rising score goals. Fill the goal bar to trigger quick celebrations, then push onward as the ceiling creeps closer. Beat your High score, earn a second chance with a rewarded continue, and watch desert backdrops shift as you progress. Easy to start, hard to master—aim, bounce, and clear your way to legend! Start in Beginner, then unlock Medium and Hard as your score surges ever higher!

title: Feet Doctor Urgency Care
description:
As a podiatrist in this medical simulation game, treat various urgent foot conditions and save patients. As a doctor, you will take care of the patient's feet.
Use all tools to cure them.

title: Hidden Horrors
description: Ready to explore the haunted Halloween world? Play a hidden object game with 30 Halloween levels. Each level has 6 hidden objects. Find all objects before time runs out. If you need help, use a hint. The game is easy to play. Enjoy colorful Halloween scenes and fun gameplay.

title: Bus Color Jam
description: Welcome to Bus Color Jam, a lively and colorful online game that challenges your coordination and quick thinking. Guide passengers to the right buses by matching their colors and keeping the station running smoothly. Every level brings new challenges that test your timing and attention. It’s a fun mix of strategy and reflexes — easy to learn, satisfying to master, and completely free to play on both your phone and computer.

title: Papas Burger Cook
description:
Cook and travel through amazing burger restaurants, discover delicious recipes, prepare tasty meals, and serve hungry customers in the best burger shop.
This is a crazy cooking game full of fast kitchen action, burger fever, and food madness. Papas Burger Cook - fun cooking simulation game.
Become the ultimate burger chef, master every recipe, and reach the highest rank in this exciting food cooking adventure.

title: Brawl Stars Battle
description: Brawl Stars Battle is an exciting action shooting game where you control powerful heroes armed with guns and special abilities to defeat opponents in fast-paced combat! Select 3v3 battle mode and fight alongside your teammates. The team that kills fifteen opponents first wins. Use guns and powerful abilities in intense battles.

title: Water Sort - Collections
description: Sort, pour, and relax! Complete each level by filling bottles and unlock beautiful collectible images. Test your logic, calm your mind, and build your own gallery as you master the art of sorting water!

title: Happy Fluffy Cubes
description: Happy Fluffy Cubes is a bright and fun 3D runner with adorable cube heroes, tricky traps, and a collection system! Choose your Fluffy and fly through levels full of danger: fire, ice, lasers, and spinning saws! Simple one-touch control, but surviving takes focus and reflexes.

title: Mojicon Love Connect
description: 2Million Games presents Mojicon Love Connect: the biggest Mojicon game to date! Match sweets, beat challenging levels and discover sweet moments in the animal kingdom!

title: Gothic Knife
description: Test your skills in this classic knife-throwing arcade game. Your goal is to stick all knives into the rotating target without hitting the ones already there. The target spins faster and more unpredictably with each level. Every 3 levels, a unique boss battle awaits you! Master the combo system to get high scores and enjoy Gothic

title: Exo Observation
description: Exo Observation is a space exploration incremental game where you uncover alien worlds and study mysterious lifeforms. You’ll collect resources, build advanced orbital science facilities, and manage them efficiently to progress. Each discovery pushes you closer to unlocking warp gates, letting you expand across the galaxy, and continue your quest for knowledge among distant stars.

title: Safe Merge
description: A simple idle merge game, you need to merge safes with same design to make a safe more powerfull, you need to unlock all design to win the game, the design are in the right, if the game was hard you can do prestige to win more money per cicle.

title: Geometry Tower Defense
description: Fast, stylish tower defense game where geometric towers blast incoming enemies along winding paths. Build on key spots, upgrade and sell towers, manage gold, and survive wave after wave. Use speed controls to handle pressure and protect your base.

title: No Pain No Gain - Ragdoll Sandbox
description: A ragdoll sandbox physics game where you place traps, cause pain, and earn coins for every hit. The more it hurts, the more you get.

title: Cars with Guns: Wasteland Showdown
description:
Accept the challenge of the post-apocalyptic wasteland. Take on contracts, earn money and reputation, and collect valuable loot.
Survival belongs to those with the fastest ride and the biggest gun.

title: Association - Connect Word
description: Dive into the world of word puzzles and associations! In this game, you need to find hidden connections between words and group them logically. Each level offers new themes, new words, and increasingly challenging tasks. The game develops thinking, expands vocabulary, and trains attention. Intuition and logic will help you complete dozens of levels, from easy to hard, and become a true master of associations. Play at your own pace without time limits and use hints if needed.

title: Crazy Traffic Racer
description: Skid the wheels of 6 stunning supercars with crazy speed limits and drive them through 4 landscape highways without crashing. Show how well you can steer the wheels of these amazing cars with roaring engines and conquer 3 awesome game modes. Use replenishing nitro to overtake slow cars and drive in speed at all times. Customize and upgrade your cars with the best upgrades and get the most out of all the cars. Are you ready to show your driving skills? Prove yourself in Crazy Traffic Racer!

title: Worm: Apple Quest
description:
Get Ready for Challenging Puzzles in Worm: Apple Quest!

In this captivating puzzle platformer, guide your worm to the legendary Golden Apple while navigating devious obstacles and perilous chasms. The secret to success? Mastering your worm's growing length.

Every apple you collect makes your worm longer, unlocking new paths - but beware! With greater length comes tougher control. One wrong turn and you might get stuck, ending your run.

title: Car Out Jam
description:
Car Parking. A puzzle game with cars and passengers.
Complete interesting levels with various mechanics!
The game will be interesting for both who want to relax leisurely and for those who like to unravel complex moves.
Easy levels are combined with more difficult ones. And some will be a real challenge for your brain!

title: Avatar World Secrets
description: Dive into various cute items, design the room setting, dress up your avatar family, and make up a life story as you like. Enjoy the fun interaction with items and characters online.

title: Hidden Objects: Island Secrets
description: Hidden Objects: Island Secrets is an exciting hidden object game where magic and time intertwine in a thrilling adventure. Everything changed when a mysterious magical crystal activated, scattering objects across time! You'll enter a world of riddles, hidden objects, and temporal paradoxes.

title: Anomaly Content Record
description: Welcome to Anomaly Content Record, a terrifying horror adventure where your only goal is to escape and survive. You’re a field investigator sent to explore a restricted research facility that went silent overnight.

title: Neon Gravity
description:
Defy gravity in this intense neon-soaked arcade runner! In Neon Gravity, your goal is to survive as long as possible by switching gravity to avoid deadly spikes, saws, and mines.

Master the timing to pass safely between rotating gears and trigger the "Perfect" bonus for massive points. As your score increases, the game speeds up, testing your reflexes to the limit. Can you unlock all 10 unique skins, including the Ninja and the Eye?

title: Sausage Man Shooting Adventure
description: Dive into a hilarious and action-packed adventure. Sausage Man Shooting Adventure is a fast-paced side-scrolling shooting game where you control a crazy, energetic sausage hero and blast through waves of enemies. Run forward, dodge traps, jump platforms, and shoot enemies with nonstop excitement! Collect airdrops to increase your damage.

title: Magic Bubbles
description: Quick games, satisfying pops and constant rewards — what’s not to love? Enjoy a bubble shooter built for endless play, with weekly bonuses, boosters that change the game and the Lucky Wheel for a little extra fun. There’s always something new to pop.

title: What a walk
description: Whatawalk! silly walking with wobbly legsWhatawalk! is a highly addictive classical game. Even if you've never heard of it before, play it just once and you'll be hooked.

title: Marble Bubble Legend
description: Marble Puzzle Quest is a fun and addictive casual puzzle game where your task is to sort colorful marbles into the correct slots. With each new level, the challenge grows — chains become longer and more colorful, while the space for moves gets tighter. Use logic, plan ahead, and clear the board! Watch out: the marbles fill four slots at the top, and only three of the same color will disappear. Place them incorrectly, and you lose the round.

title: Champions FC
description: Champions FC is a fast-paced, bite-size soccer match where you dribble, pass, and time your kicks to break through defenders and score. Play two quick halves, react to turnovers, and keep the ball in bounds. Nail the perfect moment, hear the whistle, and become Champion.

title: Dead Paradise
description: Dead Paradise: Race Shooter is an apocalyptic car game where you drive, shoot enemies, and try to survive until the finish. Completing levels gives you coins to upgrade your car’s missiles, armor, engine, and fuel. You can also buy new vehicles, take missions, and complete daily tasks for extra rewards. Use your resources wisely to make your car stronger and improve your chances of survival.

title: Pixel Destroyer
description:
Pixel Destroyer is an exciting physics-based arcade puzzle game where your goal is to destroy colorful pixel shapes using bouncing balls.

Dive into a world of pixel destruction! In this game, you’ll need to use your wits and precision. Each level features a unique shape made of pixel blocks. Your objective is to destroy them all using a limited number of shots. The balls follow the laws of physics, bouncing off walls and obstacles, allowing you to reach even the most hard-to-access blocks.

title: Sort Balls - Cones
description: Immerse yourself in a calming logic puzzle where your goal is to sort colored balls into separate tubes. Plan each move carefully so that every tube contains balls of only one color. The straightforward mechanics gradually evolve into more challenging levels that test your focus and strategic thinking.

title: Brain Draw Line
description:
Brain Draw Line is a minimalist puzzle game where you must complete shapes using a single, continuous line. There are no timers or unnecessary distractions — the focus is purely on precision and planning. Each level presents a unique figure that you must finish without lifting your finger or mouse and without crossing the line twice.
The experience is calm, strategic, and rewarding — ideal for players who enjoy logic-based challenges.

title: Clay Craft Tycoon
description: Clay Craft Tycoon is a fun factory management game where you build and grow your own clay production business. Process raw clay, craft products like pots, plates, and cups, store them in your warehouse, and sell to outside markets. Complete daily tasks, earn cash at every stage, and expand your factory with new production units to become the ultimate clay tycoon!

title: Cupid’s Story: Love Archer Bow
description: In Cupid's Story: Love Archer Bow, you play as a love archer armed with a trusty bow. Your mission is to shoot love arrows that connect hearts and spark romance. Aim carefully and watch as sparks fly and love blooms in the most unexpected places. Mix and match hearts to create unique and charming couples, from quirky characters to unlikely pairings. The possibilities are endless in this one-of-a-kind game.

title: Obby Tower
description:
Climb. Think. Survive.

Ascend a towering obstacle course filled with tricky jumps, moving platforms — and surprise math challenges! Combine your parkour skills with quick thinking to make it to the top.

Perfect for players who love obbies and want to test both reflexes and brainpower.

title: Hexa Stack
description: Welcome to Hexa Stack—an all-new hexagon puzzle that’s equal parts relaxing and challenging. Sort colorful tiles by color, stack smart to create powerful combos, and think ahead before the board fills up. Each level adds new twists, requiring focus, memory, and clever planning. Stuck? Use boosters like swap and shuffle to keep your run alive. Simple controls, satisfying merges, and nonstop brain fun!

title: Ole Bunny
description: Ole Bunny plunges you into a crazy arena where a cute bunny finds himself because of his love for roses ! Now you must show courage and skill to escape the wild bulls and collect as many fragrant roses as possible. Can you become the best bunny matador of all time?

title: Black Pink Halloween Concert
description: Step into the spooky spotlight with Black Pink Halloween Concert, a thrilling dress-up game where you style the K-Pop superstars for their haunted Halloween performance. Choose from a wide variety of creepy-cute costumes, bold hairstyles, and festive accessories to make the members shine on stage.

title: 1945 Air Force Space Shooter
description: Prepare for nonstop action in 1945 Air Force: Space Shooter! Inspired by the classic shooter era, this game combines vintage visuals with thrilling bulletstorm gameplay that will test your reflexes and precision.Fly through endless waves of enemy aircraft. Avoid storms of bullets and unleash devastating firepower from your Force fighter.

title: Circuit Master
description: Circuit Master is a puzzle game where you aim to get a green light by connecting the circuit correctly! Arrange the wires, fans, and machines in the right places, then turn on the button to see the electricity flow. Only the correctly connected circuit will make the green light shine. Use hints if you need help.

title: Soccer Duel
description: An exciting game in the style of table football, which you can play both alone and with friends on the same device or over the network.

title: Break a Lucky Egg Brainrots
description: Break a Lucky Egg Brainrots is a fast and rewarding collection game where action, risk, and strategy come together. Your mission is to break brainrot eggs, collect rare Brainrot characters, and safely deliver them to your base before time runs out. Each run is a mix of decision making and reflex.

title: Path ice
description:
Chill the soda, add some ice, but here's the problem, it's not so easy to get into the glass, you need to draw a path for the ice.

Draw the path as you like.
Go through many levels
Discover all kinds of ice and glasses

title: Coin Color Sort
description: Dive into the colorful world of Coin Color Sort, an addictive online puzzle game that puts your sorting skills to the test. Arrange and match coins by color to create perfect stacks and clear each level. With its relaxing yet challenging gameplay, this free game offers endless fun and mental exercise. Play anytime on your computer or phone and see how far your logic can take you!

title: Car Jam: Traffic Puzzle
description: Get ready for Car Jam: Traffic Puzzle, the ultimate test of logic and fun! Untangle the traffic, move the cars, and clear the way in this addictive puzzle adventure. With every level, new challenges appear—packed parking lots, tricky buses, and colorful traffic jams waiting for your brainpower. Easy to play, hard to master, and endlessly entertaining.

title: Car Vs Zombies
description:
Car vs Zombie is a fast-paced low-poly survival game where you smash through endless zombie waves with your car, build turrets, and defend your base from the undead horde! 
Get ready for non-stop action in Car vs Zombie, a low-poly, cartoony survival game where chaos meets fun!
Will you survive the apocalypse — or become zombie food?

title: Challenger City Driver
description: Get ready to skid the wheels of a stunning muscle through an expansive morning city map! Customize and upgrade your sports car with cool upgradables and become the best driver in the city. Take your dog with you in 3 driving challenges and conquer the missions together. Use nitro to beat slow traffic and beat all speed, stunt and drift triggers spread across the map. Are you ready to show your driving skills? Prove yourself!

title: Sid & Ginny Y2K Glam Clash
description: Welcome to the Y2K style fashion world! Two charismatic heroines are waiting for you, ready to try on fashion trends from the 2000s. Create spectacular makeup for them with lip gloss, shining shadows and glossy skin; choose stylish hairstyles - from smooth straight hair to playful ponytails and fashionable hairpins. Experiment with low-cut jeans, crop tops, mini skirts, shiny fabrics, and bold combinations. Complete the resulting image with iconic accessories of those years.

title: Associations
description:
Find Associations between words!

There are many different levels waiting for you with no time limit. No rush, just an exciting game that will help you relax and unwind.

This game is suitable for those who want to test their wits in this interesting puzzle game!

The game will definitely interest you if you like "Wordle", "Mahjong", "Guess the words", "2048", "Nonograms", "Crosswords", "Filwords", "Three in a row", "Puzzles", "Reagents".

Have a nice game!

title: THE KULKA
description:
THE KULKA is a one-button bullet-heaven arcade game where your single shot evolves into chaos. Inspired by Flappy Birds, Vampire Survivor and Pattern Survivors: Bullet Hell. 

MUTATE YOUR BULLET. FLAP, EVOLVE, SURVIVE.

title: Boyfriend For Hire
description: Pushed by her mom to start dating, studious Amy hires charming transfer student Javier to pose as her boyfriend. Rival Christie, jealous rumors, and a flirty study partner turn the act into real complications. Choose outfits, make tough choices, and decide if this love is real—or just for show.

title: Car Mechanic Simulator 2025
description:
In "Car Mechanic Simulator 2025", you are a master restorer who breathes new life into forgotten cars! 

Your task is to find old, broken, and abandoned cars, disassemble them down to the last screw, repair them, replace parts, and reassemble them, turning rusty piles of metal into shiny legends of the automotive industry. Search for rare spare parts, restore engines, choose the perfect paint, and bring every detail to perfection.

title: Road Of Fury 4
description: Road Of Fury 4 is a scroller shooter game set in a world of post-apocalypse. Team-up with other nomads, upgrade cars, guns and super-powers and use your skills to fight through 30 levels and 3 bosses.

title: Chain Puzzle
description: Chain Puzzle is a relaxing logic game where you carefully untangle intricate chained constructions. Each construction is a single system of two same-colored balls connected by a chain. Every move changes the shape of the structure: the chain can automatically shorten, opening new ways to solve the puzzle. Observe, adjust positions, and find the right sequence of actions to completely unravel the knot.

title: Elytra Flight
description: Elytra Flight is an endless flying adventure inspired by the legendary Elytra wings. Players take to the skies in a fast-paced challenge where reflexes and strategy decide how long they can survive. Whether solo or in 2 player mode, the game blends arcade action with survival mechanics, offering a fresh and rewarding experience every flight.

title: Toy Rumble 3d
description: Begin an explosive toy adventure in Toy Rumble 3D. A 3D running and racing arcade game packed with action, speed, and strategy. Move your tank through chaotic obstacle courses, collect parts, assemble your cannon, and shoot your way to victory.

title: Love Colors
description: Dive into Love Colors, the ultimate relaxing coloring app! Transform this elegant Art Nouveau portrait of a graceful woman—adorned with swirling leaves and blooms—using lush reds, pinks, and light pinks. Effortless tools: zoom, undo, redo, and instant download. Unleash creativity, melt stress away!

title: Basket Swap
description: Slide into the gray blocks to help you position the ball and grid correctly. If you're stuck, click on the arrow in the bottom left corner to undo your last move, or press R to restart the level.

title: Kings and Queens Match 3
description: Step into Kings and Queens Match 3, the enchanting third chapter of the royal Match-3 adventure! Match jewels, crowns, and other royal artifacts to progress through exciting levels. Use powerful boosters like bombs, hammers, and royal blasts to clear challenging boards. Unlock new parts of the kingdom as you enjoy stunning visuals and a charming soundtrack. Join the royal quest and discover treasure, challenge, and endless fun!

title: Dream Kitchen
description: Dream Kitchen is a fun and fast-paced restaurant simulation game inspired by shawarma-style cooking gameplay. Take customer orders, cook the right food, and serve every dish on time to keep customers happy. Complete levels with 3-star ratings, earn coins, upgrade your kitchen equipment, and unlock new recipes. Explore multiple themed chapters, including a Pancake Shop, Street Stall, Fast Food Restaurant, and Western Restaurant, each with unique dishes and challenges!

title: Magic Beauty Makeup
description: Welcome to Magic Beauty Makeup, a casual and relaxing girl makeover game on H5games4u. The girl is in trouble with her appearance. Help her return to her original beauty with skin care and makeup methods. You will act as a makeover artist who does skin care, applies facial makeup, and designs a perfect look in the virtual fashion salon. And the best part? All the makeup procedures are done just by clicking and dragging.

title: Connect Clues - The Missing Professor
description:
A tangled detective story is about to unfold.

Inspector Hale and Detective Crane are on the trail of a mysteriously vanished professor of history and archaeology — who also happens to be Crane’s old friend.
Professor Eldridge was always a touch eccentric, but disappearing without a word and leaving his office turned upside down was never part of his habits. He’s clearly in trouble — and in need of help.

title: Word Solitaire
description: Challenge your mind with a fresh twist on a classic with Word Solitaire! This addictive word solitaire blends clever word-building with strategic card gameplay, creating a unique solo experience. Find categories, reveal hidden words, and clear the board in increasingly challenging levels. Perfect for quick breaks or long sessions—relax, think, and master the art of words!

title: Mini Golf Battle
description: Mini Golf Battle is a casual sports puzzle where precision and timing decide the outcome. Your task is to sink the ball into the hole with the fewest strokes possible while navigating ramps, walls, and tricky obstacles. Special power-ups like Fire, Wing, and Spring shots add variety, letting you approach each course with unique strategies. Whether for short play sessions or longer runs, Mini Golf Battle delivers an engaging mix of relaxation and skillful play.

title: Idle Money Factory
description: Money Factory is a fast-paced clicker game with strategic elements where you build and expand your financial empire by optimizing money production lines. Start with a simple setup and gradually grow by upgrading equipment, unlocking new production areas, and enhancing efficiency to skyrocket your profits.

title: Epic Racing - Descent on Cars
description:
To tear yourself and your neighbor to shreds, but to reach the finish line first is an "Epic Racing - Descent on Cars"!

Epic collisions, a serious fight to the finish line and a million ways to bend and twist metal - that's what awaits you in the game "Epic Racing - Descent on Cars".

Burn rubber and tear metal - the game begins!

title: Slicer Duo
description: Slicer Duo is a satisfying ASMR game where precision, timing, and rhythm come together in a sharp slicing adventure. Move through level-based stages, cut through fruits and all kinds of objects, collect points, and try to keep your knife in motion for as long as possible. While the controls are simple, every section demands focus because one bad move can send your knife straight into danger.

title: Lovie Chics Spring Break Fashion
description: Lovie Chics Spring Break Fashion” is your ultimate destination for chic and trendy outfits perfect for the spring break season! Explore our curated collection of vibrant dresses, stylish swimwear, and must-have accessories designed to elevate your style and make a statement wherever you go. Whether you’re hitting the beach, lounging by the pool, or exploring new destinations, we have everything you need to look and feel fabulous all spring break long.

title: Perfect Cake Maker
description: Get ready to make some seriously delicious cakes in Perfect Cake Maker! It’s a delightful casual simulation game. When you start, you’ll see a fully stocked kitchen and delicious guests waiting. First, choose the cake base based on your guests’ needs. Then comes the fun part – mixing the ingredients!

title: Christmas Blind Box‌
description: This is a Christmas toy blind box opening game! Click the "Open" button to test your luck—can you beat the high score for the number of Christmas toys collected?

title: Mission Santa: Deliver the Gifts
description:
Santa must deliver gifts to children in time! There are many kids and only one Santa, so everything has to be done on the fly! Fly in a sleigh on Christmas night and throw gifts down chimneys to make children happy. 

The game helps you feel the atmosphere of the approaching holiday and prepare for the most magical time of the year!

title: Vortex io
description:
Play Vortex.io for free! Swallow everything in your path and become the biggest vortex in this fast-paced io game.

Vortex.io is a competitive .io game where you control a growing vortex that can swallow objects, vehicles, and even other players. As you absorb more items, your size increases, making you more powerful in the arena. The game features smooth controls and intense gameplay, requiring quick reflexes and smart movement to survive and dominate your rivals in real time.

title: Shoot 2048 Hexa
description: Shoot 2048 Hexa is a fun and colorful puzzle game where you shoot hexagon tiles with numbers to make bigger ones. Aim carefully and match the same numbers to reach new values. The board slowly fills up, so think fast and plan your moves. Try to stay in the game as long as you can and get the highest score!

title: Home Match: Tile Master
description: Tile Master - Classic Triple Match & Puzzle Game is a challenging matching game.? In the game, you need to blow your mind and match 3 numbers of blocks. When all tiles are matched, you can pass the current level!? Our puzzle game includes large numbers of levels. Some levels might be hard. Challenge your mind and solve the puzzles, and then you will find them easy and exciting!

title: Dream Mania Happy Match
description: Ready to begin a fantastic match-3 puzzle adventure? Dream Mania - Happy Match is a fun puzzle game that you won't be able to stop playing. It's easy to play, yet the challenging level design. It's a casual game you don't want to miss! Match 3 or more identical items to clear the board and hit your level goals.

title: Math Runner
description: Challenge your mind and reflexes in this fast-paced arithmetic adventure! Solve math problems on the run, dodge obstacles, and race against time to achieve the highest score. Perfect for players of all ages looking to sharpen their math skills while enjoying thrilling gameplay.

title: FlowBall
description: Feel the adrenaline in an exciting 3D arcade game where you control a glowing ball racing through an endless tunnel! Avoid traps, chasms and obstacles, defying the laws of gravity. Your goal is to collect glowing dots to unlock new levels and set records! But be careful: falling into the abyss takes away lives, and losing them leads to defeat!

title: Serious Head 2
description:
The adventures of a serious head continue.
Portals open, monsters come out.
Prepare for battle: rebuild your base and upgrade your weapons.
Take your partners to help you and put up a decent resistance!

title: Sword and Jewel
description: Sword and Jewel is a fun and addictive match-3 puzzle game where you place colorful gems on the board to create lines of three or more. Match gems in rows or columns to clear them, score points, and keep the board from filling up. Plan your moves carefully - when there’s no space left for new gems, the game ends!

title: Marble Blast
description: Ready to match, blast, and conquer? This vibrant marble shooter game offers endless fun and challenges that test your skills and strategy. Clear colorful marbles, unlock powerful boosters, and prove you’re the master of marble puzzles! Whether you’re a casual gamer or a puzzle enthusiast, this game delivers excitement like no other.

title: Goal io
description: Play Goal.io free online and jump into a fast-paced browser game you can play instantly with no download and no install. Score wild goals, dodge rivals, and outplay opponents in quick matches that test reflexes like a competitive brain game. This unblocked game loads fast and runs smoothly at school or home, perfect for short breaks. Fully mobile-friendly and optimized for desktop and mobile, it’s a free online game built for nonstop soccer action anytime.

title: Blast Cubes
description: Blast Cubes is an addictive puzzle game where players strategically place cubes on a grid. When cubes align in horizontal or vertical rows, they explode, triggering an exciting chain reaction! After the explosion, characters of the same color as the exploded cube emerge and move towards vehicles of the same color waiting at the top. Once the vehicles are filled, new ones appear, continuing the cycle.

title: Hill Racing - Egg drop!
description:
Press down to accelerate your car. Go as fast as you can carrying an egg while collection coins. 

Upgrade your cars and levels with coins.

title: Obby Highest Jump Ever
description:
Obby Highest Jump Ever is a click-based jumping and climbing game where every click makes you stronger. Start from a small 10M building and push your way up to massive 2500M towers as your jump power grows step by step. Each new height feels like a new milestone, and every rooftop trophy proves you earned it.

Your goal is simple: jump higher, reach the top, and collect trophies. The higher the building, the bigger the reward.

title: Brainrot Bridge Race 3D
description: This is not just a simple running and racing game. It’s a brainrot-style 3D battle where speed and strategy collide! Your goal is to collect as many bananas as possible while sprinting through hilarious obstacle courses. Collect more bananas to evolve your form.

title: Sprunki Phase Brainrot
description: Sprunki Phase Brainrot is a chaotic and hilarious reskin of the original Sprunki game, now powered by Italian Brainrot energy! Play as absurd meme legends like Tralalero Tralala, Tung Tung Tung Sahur, Frigo Camelo, La Vaca Saturno, Lirili Larila, Burbaloni Luliloli, and many more. Run, jump, and lose your mind through surreal levels packed with brainrot humor, crazy visuals, and unpredictable madness. Enjoy custom sound effects and music that match each character’s bizarre personality!

title: Hero Merge
description:
Hero Merge is an exciting tower defense game where strategy and firepower combine! Merge your heroes to create stronger units, strategically position them on grid, and defend your wall against waves of different enemies. Unlimited waves, plenty of perks and many different units!

Will your heroes stand strong, or will the enemies break through?

title: Animal Block Pop Puzzle
description: Animal Block Pop Puzzle is a fun puzzle game with cute animal-themed visuals. ??✨ Match 3+ animal-shaped blocks ?? on a grid to clear them and score points. As you progress, the game gets faster and adds new tile colors for a growing challenge. With easy drag-and-drop controls and vibrant graphics, it offers a relaxing yet exciting experience for all ages.

title: Mad Dash
description: Mad Dash is a free puzzle platform game.  You are a minotaur trapped in one of the last mazes in the galaxy: a maze of levels. You'll have to jump and dash over treacherous obstacles and challenges to make it through this maze. Many of the platforms are too far apart for you to make it with a simple jump. That is why the mad dash was created. The mad dash happens when players need to jump over spikes or a crevasse that their normal jump wouldn't traverse.

title: Labubu and Treasures: Fun Adventure
description: Collect bright combinations, pass hundreds of levels together with amazing characters from the Labubu universe! In this exciting Match-3 puzzle you will find bright adventures, interesting puzzles and fluffy magic.

title: Bubble Shooter Crystal Hunt
description: Bubble Shooter Crystal Hunt is an exciting endless bubble-shooting puzzle game where players must collect specific target bubbles along with rare magical crystals that appear among the bubbles. Aim carefully and match three or more bubbles of the same color to clear space while the bubble wall slowly moves toward the border line, increasing tension with every shot. Crystals are hidden within bubble clusters and must also be collected to progress and boost scores.

title: Gomu Goman
description: With simple tap-and-drag gameplay, Gomu Goman offers hundreds of challenging and laugh-out-loud levels. Each level is a unique puzzle that demands creativity—and a certain degree of spicy humor from you.

title: Bus Jam Escape
description: Bus Jam Escape brings addictive color-matching puzzle action straight to your browser. In this free online game, you’ll guide waiting passengers into buses by matching their colors - no download required. Ideal for fans of casual puzzle and sorting games, Bus Jam Escape delivers crisp graphics, instant play and intuitive click-and-drag controls. Jump into this vibrant web game for quick brain teasers or marathon sessions - every tap pushes you closer to a high-score win.

title: Guess The Italian Brainrot Animals
description: Get ready for a wild and hilarious ride with Guess the Italian Brainrot Animals, a fast-paced, emoji-fueled trivia game that tests your knowledge of 64 iconic Italian Brainrot characters! From the most famous to the obscure, this game challenges you to guess the correct character based on three emoji clues before the timer runs out. Think you’re a Brainrot expert? Prove it!

title: 2 Player Games Kids Kitchen
description: Do you want to run your own restaurant? Want to experience the blend of collaboration and cooking fun? Join H5games4u's best restaurant tycoon game and enjoy cooking fun. You will engage in different gaming modes. The best part is that you can work together with your friends in the virtual restaurant!

title: Fox Adventure
description:
Is a dynamic endless runner that brings back the spirit of classic arcade games!
Run or Lose! Control a brave fox in a world where danger lurks at every step. Fiery meteors rain down from the sky, and deadly spikes cover the ground. Your reflexes are your best weapon. Jump, dodge, and survive as long as you can!
Build Your Collection Grab gold coins along the way! Visit the shop to unlock unique looks: become a futuristic Cyber-Fox, put on a Clown costume, wear the Royal robe.

title: Flow Block
description: Perfectly blends the classic Tetris gameplay with innovative sand flow mechanics. In the game, players not only follow the basic rules of traditional Tetris but also need to guide flowing sand particles to fill target areas.

title: Chess Duel
description: Master the art of chess with three exciting modes, each offering flexible time settings to suit every player. Take your chess skills to the next level, climb the ranks from Bronze to Diamond and strive to become a top chess player.

title: Dino Hunter King
description: Action-packed FPS games have long attracted players. Enjoy dinosaur hunting in Dino Hunter King. Enter a wild prehistoric world, become an elite hunter tracking powerful dinosaurs across open grasslands.

title: Small Wardrobe
description: Small Wardrobe is a casual game designed specifically for cotton dolls. Collect and create beautiful and cute dresses for your cotton dolls, and experience heartwarming and fun stories. The game offers a variety of adorable doll clothes, shoes, and accessories. Let's happily organize and tidy up the doll's wardrobe together!

title: Shotting Balls
description: In this fun game, you'll have to use your skills to destroy all the black blocks you find in each level in order to advance to the next one. But that's not all: you'll also have to avoid losing the ball, because if it leaves the screen, you'll lose a life and, ultimately, the game. On the other hand, you can also collect gems, which will allow you to obtain new skins to give your ball a new look.

title: Geometry Rush
description: Geometry Rush will take you to a world of challenging and treacherous platforming. Are you ready to run through trap-filled passages, jump and dodge death? Learn from your mistakes, perfect your reflexes, master the path without a single slip and advance to the next level.

title: Hide and Luig
description: Hide and Luig is a whimsical point-and-click hide-and-seek adventure where your only goal is to find the ever-elusive Luig—who insists on hiding inside the weirdest objects imaginable.

title: Garden Block Puzzle
description: A neglected garden, overrun by weeds and dried flowers… it can't stay like this! Test your wits, place the bricks strategically, complete each level and bring your garden back to life. Have fun playing and create the perfect space to relax.

title: Melon Drop: Fruit Merge Master
description: Dive deep into the vibrant and enthralling world of fruit-matching with our exciting game, Fruit Merge: Juicy Drop Game! ??? When the same fruits collide, they merge into a larger fruit. Your mission is to smartly pair the same types of fruits to make the biggest possible fruits without letting them overflow from the container. However, as the fruits grow in size, space becomes a premium - managing it effectively is your key challenge. Can you strategize and solve this fruity puzzle?

title: Parkour Obby
description: Dive into the ultimate parkour adventure with Parkour Obby! Immerse yourself in a world of stunning, blocky beauty inspired by iconic Minecraft graphics. Leap, sprint, and climb through meticulously crafted levels, each more breathtaking than the last. From towering cliffs to dazzling pixelated landscapes, every jump tests your skills, timing, and creativity.

title: Italian Brainrot Clicker
description: Italian Brainrot Clicker is a hilarious one-button idle clicker that throws you into the chaotic charm of the Italian Brainrot universe. Fueled by Gen-Z meme culture and AI-generated madness, this game unleashes a world of mutant creatures and meme-fueled mayhem. From dancing cappuccinos to cactus-bodied elephants, every tap pulls you deeper into a spiral of satire and brainrot. It is weird, it is wild, and it is wonderfully addictive. You will not believe what you are unlocking next!

title: Isometric Escape
description: Isometric is an escape game where you solve a series of puzzles to escape from isometric rooms. Find all the useful objects and use your logic and memory to solve the riddles.

title: RPG Idle Clicker
description: Join the adventure in RPG Idle Clicker, a thrilling idle RPG where you slay monsters with a single tap! Click to deal damage, earn gold, and unlock powerful swords to boost your clicks. Upgrade your blades and recruit auto-attacking heroes who fight monsters every second, even offline. With stunning visuals, face tougher foes and epic bosses in this browser-based game. Perfect for active players or idle fans, RPG Idle Clicker offers endless progression!

title: Diamond Solitaire Mahjong
description: Step into the radiant world of Diamond Solitaire Mahjong! Enjoy a beautifully crafted single puzzle with shimmering tiles adorned with diamonds, gems, and sparkling jewels. Zoom in and out for the perfect view as you match tiles in a relaxing setting. Earn points for quick matches and climb the leaderboard. Perfect for casual players and Mahjong fans seeking a peaceful yet rewarding experience.

title: Dig out of Prison
description:
You are a prisoner determined to break free. Dig tunnels with a spoon, shovel, or anything you can find. Discover valuables, trade with fellow inmates and even the guards, and earn the prison’s top currency — toilet paper.

Upgrade your digging and trading skills, unlock better tools, and speed up your escape. But be careful — plan your moves and avoid drawing attention, because freedom is the prize only for the most cunning.

title: Deadly Parkour
description:
Dynamic Duo:
Take control of two distinct characters, each with their own strengths and abilities. 

Precision Platforming:
Immerse yourself in the thrilling world of precision platforming, where every jump matters. Test your reflexes and hone your skills as you traverse 70 meticulously hand crafted levels.

title: Fishing the Russian Way
description:
Embark on a journey through Central Russia: picturesque rivers and lakes, different types of fish, and the exciting process of fishing. Improve your tackle, control your rod, decide the fate of your catch, and add to your collection of rare finds.

Use your car to discover new locations, complete tasks, participate in tournaments, and receive daily rewards. Freedom of choice and the path to becoming a true fishing master await you!

title: Toca Teens Floating Beach Party
description: The Toca Teens are ready for the ultimate floating party—and they’re counting on your style sense! In Toca Teens Floating Beach Party, your goal is to get everyone dressed in their best summer-ready looks before the fun begins.

title: Savage Defenders
description: A tower defense strategy action game where you become the last hope of a tribe living at the foot of an ancient volcano. When an asteroid with an alien threat falls to the planet, you must combine magic, tactics and the strength of warriors to stop the invader who is devouring all life.

title: 3D Super Rolling Ball Race
description: Like speed? Love excitement? Then you can't afford to miss this awesome 3D Super Rolling Ball Race! It’s a wild, high-speed 3D platform game that will test your reflexes, timing, and racing spirit! The operation is simple but full of challenges, super suitable for those who like running and arcade-style. Control a rolling ball, navigate through tricky platforms, and avoid falling off!

title: Lovely Cat Pet Life
description: Call for all pet lovers! If you are a DIY enthusiast or enjoy playing with cute animals, join Lovely Cat: Pet Life, a casual DIY cat game online. Dive into this adorable, fun-filled, and creative game that combines the elements of cats, pets, fashion, and DIY all in one perfect package! Play dress-up game: Try out charming suits on your pet. Decorate an ideal look for your kitten. Enjoy minigames unblocked: Join mini animal parkour games with your little cat.

title: Tralala Connect
description:
Tralala Connect – the ultimate Italian Brainrot meme puzzle!
Find and connect matching tiles featuring your favorite absurd meme characters.
Sharpen your focus and logic through 15 increasingly chaotic levels.
Unlock all 45 stars if your brain can handle the rot.
Mamma mia, it's peak concentration with a spicy twist!

title: Purrfect Bakery
description: Purrfect Bakery is a cozy and heartwarming game where a sweet cat runs a bakery for cute animal customers. Serve yummy treats, unlock new adorable visitors, and enjoy the simple joy of baking and friendship!

title: Geometry Platformer
description: Geometry Platformer is a fast-paced, reflex-testing platformer where players guide a shape-shifting cube through a series of dangerous geometric obstacles. The game features sharp spikes, swinging hazards, and gravity-defying mechanics that challenge your timing and precision. The neon graphics and intense gameplay create a thrilling experience, requiring quick reactions and memorization of complex patterns.

title: Burger Empire
description:
Welcome to Burger & Beans Cafe, the ultimate restaurant-management game where you cook juicy burgers, brew the perfect coffee, and build the eatery of your dreams!

• Serve Delicious Orders: Flip patties and pour lattes for hungry customers—fast!
• Earn & Upgrade: Collect coins to unlock chic new tables, comfy booths, and vibrant dining areas.
• Customize Your Space: Choose décor, layout, and special menu items to keep guests coming back.

title: Sliding Puzzle
description: A premium, modern Sliding Puzzle game featuring progressive levels, AI auto-solve, custom themes, and satisfying sound effects. Challenge yourself with 3x3, 4x4, and 5x5 grids. Arrange numbered tiles in order by sliding them into the empty space. Perfect for brain training and logic improvement!

title: Reflect Beam: Laser Logic
description:
Logic game where every move changes the beam’s path. 

5 modes - 5 types of challenges.
Tunnel: rotate shapes and guide the beam through narrow passages.
Labyrinth: draw a safe path to the exit.
Same Colors: remove blocks of the right color to open the route.
Obstacles: move elements and clear the way for the beam.
Time is limeted: solve faster and more accurately before time runs out.

title: Peckshot
description: Stop the arrow at the right time and keep hitting the target. If you miss the target, the game ends. You can earn coins depending on the game results, and you can use the coins to get skins.

title: Try To Count The Boxes Brain Training
description:
Challenge your memory, speed and attention in "Try To Count The Boxes Brain Training". Watch boxes appear, remember the count, then submit your guess faster and more accurate each round wins.

Enjoy single-player focus mode or competitive rounds vs local friend or multiplayer. Simple tap controls, short rounds, addictive replayability perfect for quick brain workouts on desktop and mobile.

Train memory, logic, agility and reaction time now!

title: Dragon Year Jigsaw
description: Dive into the lively universe of 'Dragon Year Jigsaw,' a comical online puzzle game set in the Chinese Dragon Year. Solve 24 levels of dragon-themed jigsaw puzzles, featuring vibrant and playful comic art. Perfect for puzzle lovers and those seeking a whimsical online experience. Join the fun – start piecing together your dragon adventure now!

title: Meme Mukbang ASMR Game
description: Welcome to Meme Mukbang ASMR Game, the ultimate livestream mukbang experience! Step into the world of a quirky mukbang streamer, where you’ll indulge in delicious dishes and share your mukbang ASMR moments with a growing audience. The more you eat and interact, the more you earn, all while building your fame in the livestream world!

title: Kawaii Claw Merge
description:
The cutest merging adventure has arrived, featuring some of the most colorful Kawaii plushies around! 

Show off your merging skills by combining smaller Kawaii plushies to get a bigger plushy! Can you discover the biggest plushy of them all?

Ready for a serious dose of cuteness?
Play Kawaii Merge now - and let the merging magic begin!

title: Plant Merge: Zombie War
description: In the chaotic world of Merge Plant Zombie War, arm your garden with strategic merges to fend off relentless zombie hordes! Master upgrades, deploy special abilities, and outsmart waves of undead foes in this addictive merge-tower defense adventure. Will your botanical army prevail in the ultimate war for survival? Dive in and merge your way to victory!

title: SWAT Cats Shooter
description: SWAT Cats is an online shooter set in a world where every hero is a battle cat. Ready for purr-fect battle with wild action? Jump in, grab your helmet, and join the fight.

title: Dear Island
description:
Collect two blocks that match the color of the Match Slot to clear them!
Clear them all to finish the stage!
Blocks of different colors can be placed in the Stock.
If the Stock gets full, it’s game over!

title: Strongblade
description:
Your favorite gameplay: match-3 puzzle game with building elements! Play three-in-a-row and set up impressive campgrounds!
Hundreds of varied levels with incredible boosters and explosive combinations!
Lots of game events and tough challenges! Complete exciting quests to upgrade your camp!
Atmospheric fantasy world: detailed animations, picturesque landscapes and charming characters!
Interesting characters who are ready to become your friends and join your journey!

title: Mystical Blade 3D
description: Enter the world of Mystical Blades, where you design and battle your own B-Blades! Mix blades, rings, and elements to create powerful combos, then face players worldwide in thrilling battles. With stunning graphics and realistic physics, prove your skills and become the ultimate B-Blades master!

title: Merge Fusion
description: Merge Fusion is an entertaining and addictive casual game where you combine and evolve items to create superior versions. The goal is to drag and merge identical items, triggering new fusions and unlocking more challenging levels as you progress. The game features simple, relaxing gameplay that is perfect for unwinding. Experience the satisfaction of watching your creations grow progressively in complexity as you explore new possibilities with each merge.

title: Ibiza Foam Party
description: Splash around in a sea of bubbles, dance to pumping beats, and compete against friends in wild and energetic beauty challenges. Ready to get the fun started? Then join Gina and Selena in this colorful, summer-themed makeover game for girls, and help them deal with their dazzling party looks. From scrubbing and skincare to makeup and fabulous fashion, you’re the ultimate stylist, ensuring these besties shine bright under the Ibiza sun.

title: Dark Myth: Monkey Merge
description: Merge warriors, build your army, and fight through hordes of monsters as the Monkey King! Your master and companions have been captured — combine strategy and action to rescue them all. From Common to Legendary, every merge makes you stronger.

title: Unlock the Bolts
description: Unlock the Bolts is a challenging puzzle game where you carefully remove screws to solve mechanical puzzles. Each level tests your logic and precision as you figure out the correct order to unlock the bolts. In special levels, the stakes are even higher—you must free trapped animals by unlocking the right bolts! With satisfying mechanics and engaging challenges, this game will keep you thinking and entertained. Can you master every puzzle and rescue the animals in need?

title: Tiles Matching
description:
Free online game Tiles Matching - play in the browser without downloading. It is suitable for the development of logic for both adults and children - an ideal timekiller.
Tiles Matching is a puzzle game combining the game mechanics of Mahjong and Three in a Row (Match-3). A logical educational game for children and adults. With each level, the difficulty increases - not everyone can complete the game the first time. Challenge your intelligence.

title: Monsterella Fantasy Makeup
description: Step into the monstrous world of beauty with "Monsterella Fantasy Makeup". This spookily engaging game lets you work your makeover magic on three iconic cartoon characters. In Frankie's unit, electrify her look with eerie eyeshadows, neon lipstick, shockingly cool hairstyles, and otherworldly outfits. Next, embrace Clawdeen's earthy mystique with jewel-toned makeup and howl-inducing wardrobe choices. Finally, express Draculaura's vamp chic vibe with dramatic makeup and goth-glam ensembles.

title: Number Merge 10
description: Number Merge 10 is a very innovative math puzzle game.Select a rectangular area, and if the sum of the numbers within that area equals 10, all the numbers in that area will be eliminated!

title: Merge Balls Shooter 2048 Connect Fruits
description: Dive into Merge Balls Shooter 2048 Connect Fruits! Combine fruit balls in this unique blend of 2048 and billiards. Enjoy ASMR sounds, complete juicy levels, and compete with others. Master your merging skills and embark on a fun fruit-filled adventure today!

title: Tunnel Road
description: Tunnel Road is an adrenaline-filled arcade game that requires quick reflexes, sharp focus and a great visual reaction! Keep up with the speed, avoid obstacles and cover the longest distance while advancing in a colorful and dynamic tunnel!

title: Daily Wordler
description:
Test your vocabulary and puzzle-solving skills with Daily Wordler, the ultimate word-guessing game that challenges your mind every day! With a simple yet addictive gameplay mechanic, Daily Wordler is perfect for fans of word games and brain teasers. 

Your goal is to guess the hidden word by entering valid words and using color-coded feedback to narrow down the solution. Yellow tiles indicate correct letters in the wrong position, while blue tiles signal correct letters in the right spot.

title: Ninja Spell Match
description: Ninja Spell Match is a fast-paced blend of match-3 puzzling and ninja action. Connect tiles to charge up your attacks and unleash devastating moves against waves of enemies. With each level, the challenge grows tougher as you fight your way through 30 unique stages packed with traps, puzzles, and rival ninjas. Think fast, match smart, and strike hard—your reflexes and strategy are the only way to survive.

title: Word Clash
description: Words are the key to progress. With a massive number of levels to explore, you will improve your vocabulary. Use hints when needed and stay hooked for hours. Keep solving, keep learning and see how many challenges you can conquer along the way.

title: Cube Stack 2048
description:
Cube Stack 2048 is a highly addictive casual game inspired by the classic puzzle game 2048, but with exciting new gameplay!
Merge numbered cubes to double their value, reach 2048, or even higher! Try to make it to the end.
Explore tons of amazing and challenging levels by merging cubes, avoiding obstacles, and collecting money!

title: Cinema Business - Idle Games
description:
Build and manage your own cinema empire! 
Unlock movie rooms, snack and burger corners to attract more customers.
Hire staff, upgrade facilities, and keep your theater running smoothly.
Earn cash even while you’re offline and grow your business.
Become the ultimate cinema tycoon in this fun idle arcade game!

title: Football Heads 2025
description: Unlock your potential and prove your skills. Outplay your opponents using powerful kicks and unique power-ups. Finally let them know who is the boss with the emotes system - become a football legend today!

title: Hangman Saga
description: Challenge your vocabulary with Hangman Saga! With thousands of levels, each word includes a category hint to guide you—like "Profession" for "Doctor." Guess the letters wisely, but too many mistakes end the game! Need help? Use the hint button for a clue. Perfect for all ages, this fun and educational word puzzle will keep you entertained while sharpening your spelling skills. Can you solve them all?

title: Brainrot Clicker
description:
Brainrot Clicker is a hilarious and chaotic idle clicker game that plunges you into a bizarre world of meme-fueled madness. Your mission is simple: tap the screen to earn “Italian Brainrot Points” and unlock increasingly ridiculous AI-generated characters from the internet’s wildest corners.

With eye-catching visuals, meme-inspired humor, and endless upgrades, Brainrot Clicker offers a weirdly satisfying experience you won’t want to stop!

title: Spinning Uia Uia Cat Bricker
description: Spinning Uia Uia Cat Bricker is a fun and addictive brick-breaking game where a lively cat motivates you with cheerful meows. Your goal is to clear all the bricks without dropping the ball. As you break more bricks, the cat gets even more excited, dancing and playing around. With colorful graphics and dynamic gameplay, this game offers a delightful experience for players of all ages. Stay sharp and keep up!

title: Word Stars
description: Find hidden words and piece together your success. Each puzzle is a step towards mastering the game and expanding your word power. Use hints to keep progressing. From the first word to the last, it’s a race to finish all the levels.

title: Kitty Squad Winter Dress Up
description: Step into the adorable world of Kitty Squad Winter Dress Up, where you can style your kitty for the winter season! Choose from cozy outfits, cute accessories, and festive winter gear to create the perfect look for your furry friend. With its charming graphics and endless customization options, this game is perfect for fashion lovers and cat enthusiasts alike. Start dressing up your kitty today!

title: War State IO - Conquer Battles
description:
Welcome to ultimate strategy game that lets you improve your tactical skills and lead your troops to triumph! 

Lead your army, conquer enemy camps, and expand your territory in fast-paced battles filled with action and strategy.

Every decision matters — whether you’re attacking enemy strongholds or defending your bases, clever maneuvers are key to achieving victory.

title: Monster Slayer Merge & Survive
description: Welcome to our thrilling adventure game! Your journey consists of two main parts: merging items and exploring dungeons. Embark on this epic journey, combine powerful items, and conquer the depths of the dungeon!

title: Canasta Royale Offline
description:
Canasta is the most traditional and loved card game by all. It is an exciting mix of strategy, luck and skill.Canasta uses two complete decks of 52 playing cards (French Deck) plus the four Jokers. All the Jokers and twos are wild cards.

Game Features:
★ 2 or 4 players
★ Clockwise or Counter-Clockwise
★ Game is automatically saved each turn, so you can close it and continue playing later
★ Undo function so you can cancel mistaken melds

title: Lemonade Tycoon Idle
description: Tap your way from a humble lemonade stand to a global empire! Serve customers, unlock upgrades, hire staff, and expand across the world. With a dynamic day/night cycle and relaxing lo-fi music, this is the ultimate idle lemonade experience.

title: Broomcraft Mystic Evasion
description: Broomcraft Mystic Evasion is an action-packed horde survival game where you soar through the skies on a magical broom, battling waves of enemies! Defeat foes and gather experience points to level up and grow stronger. Unlock and master powerful spells, evolving them to take down enemies even faster. Good luck in your battles!

title: Wonders of Egypt Match
description: Begin a legendary journey in Wonders of Egypt Match, a thrilling Match 3 game set in Ancient Egypt! Join your guide, the Amara, as you match three or more gems and artifacts to uncover hidden treasures and secrets buried in pyramids, temples, and obelisks. With stunning visuals and immersive soundscapes, explore a world filled with ancient mysteries and challenges. Ready to prove your skills? Join the adventure and experience the wonders of Egypt today!

title: BlowUp ATM
description: BlowUp ATM – The ultimate heist action game where you become a master thief! Your mission? Plant explosives, blow up ATMs, and grab as much cash as you can before escaping! But beware – the cops are always on high alert!

title: Girls Fun Nail Salon
description:
Girls Fun Nail Salon is a fun Makeover game. This game is designed for girls who love fashionable nail art. This game not only has vivid sound effects and images but also smooth animations. Its
gameplay is also very simple. You need to design nail art suitable for different customers, and they will give you scores, just like real customers. In the game, you can not only experience the fun of cutting and polishing nails but also the fun of designing fashionable nail art. Come and try it.

title: Happy Brothers
description: The New Year has arrived, and the two siblings have decorated the house beautifully. The siblings are very happy, but they want to go outside. To leave the house, they need to find the key and the yellow diamond. If they find both and activate the portal, they can escape the house. The two siblings, wearing Christmas clothes, begin searching for the key inside the house. They also need to gather the gift boxes.

title: G Wagon City Driver
description: Dive into city driving with four game modes. Navigate busy morning streets, managing fuel and realistic traffic. Venture beyond the city to tackle rugged offroad terrain. Stunning morning graphics bring the city and landscapes to life, while unpredictable pedestrians and police chases add excitement. Customize your G-Wagon's look and performance, and enjoy the ride with your loyal dog. Whether evading cops or exploring trails, G-Wagon City Driver offers a thrilling experience.

title: Crazy Tunnel
description: Crazy Tunnel is a fast-paced, first-person arcade game. Navigate through the tunnel at breakneck speeds and aim for the longest distance possible.

title: Word Voyager
description:
Word Voyager - Embark on the ultimate quest for words,right on your touchscreen!

Solve puzzles and expand your vocabulary smoothly.

Follow Olivia, your trusty guide, as she navigates you through the gentle murmurs of an ancient library. Uncover secrets during the 'Daily Mission'. Find hidden stars that unlock new thematic categories that will take you on a odyssey through the infinite universe of words.

title: Badlands Hero
description:
Step into a treacherous world teeming with enemies and peril. Guide your hero across the battlefield — they’ll fire automatically when foes show up!

? Conquer intense levels
? Gain XP to unlock unique heroes
? Gather gold to enhance your gear
? Unleash powerful weapon types
? Face off against epic bosses and climb the ranks

Easy to play, hard to master. Do you have what it takes to rule the Badlands?

title: Hidden Easter Egg Hunt
description: Dive into the fun world of Hidden Easter Egg Hunt, a fun and relaxing hidden object game for players of all ages! Explore colorful spring landscapes filled with blooming flowers, green fields, and playful bunnies as you search for hidden Easter eggs scattered around the game board. With charming graphics and a festive feel, this game is perfect for getting into the Easter spirit. Test your observation skills, challenge your attention to detail, and enjoy the joyful hunt!

title: Worms
description: Worms is a fun and addictive arcade puzzle where you control a cute worm and guide it through winding labyrinths. Your task is to lead the worm through the entire maze, collect rewards, use portals and avoid dead ends. Bright cartoon-style graphics and easy controls make the game perfect for both kids and adults. Worms combines fast arcade action with puzzle-solving logic, turning every new level into a fresh and exciting challenge.

title: 2048Skill Edition
description: Ini adalah permainan kesenangan untuk 2.048, dan terutama kami telah menambahkan permainan dan keterampilan baru yang memungkinkan pengguna untuk mengalami 2048 berbeda.

title: Merge Gun Fps Shooting Zombie
description: Merge Gun: FPS Shooting Zombie's main mission is to shoot down all coming undead creatures before they kill you. Before you join the battle, you can buy more guns and merge the same guns into new advanced ones. With more powerful and fast ammo in the clip, you can deal with incoming enemies more easily. Both zombies and crows will move forward to you even if you are still reloading. Keep calm and shoot the explosive oil cans on the ground if necessary.

title: Texas Holdem Poker
description: Players compete for winning combinations of cards using their skills and intuition. The game has the ability to bet, bluff and recognize the bluff of other players. Players can choose different difficulty levels and customize their own game rules. The unique interface design and realistic atmosphere allow you to immerse yourself in the world of card games and enjoy the excitement anytime and anywhere.

title: Stickman Rogue Online
description: Get ready for an exciting stickman adventure! You will enter an exciting survival battlefield.Fight nervous battles against increasing enemies constantly. Collect experience points and progress through endless waves of enemies. Each wave of enemies is more challenging, so be careful to upgrade your skills to survive! Collect energy boosters in battle to upgrade your stickman skills. Increase speed, increase attack or increase defense.

title: Planet Hopper
description: Use your ship to navigate and jump between different planets across the galaxy, but be careful not to drift off into the vastness of outer space!

title: Avatar Life My Town
description: Avatar Life: My Town game is a casual simulator game for kids. You can enjoy creating your sweet home stories! Meet fun family characters in the dollhouse game! Role-play house games and manage family life in your new home! You need to take good care of your character and prepare delicious food. Cooking a big meal.

title: My Fire Station World
description: Have you ever wondered how the firefighter rescues and helps others in emergencies? How do they deal with dangerous fires? This role-play takes you to explore the world of firefighters and learn about their daily work. Our game has 6 scenarios about the life and work of firefighters for you to choose from. You can drag and drop to place the characters as you like, place props, and change the firefighting costumes.

title: Crazy Bar Brawl
description: Crazy Bar Brawl ?? throws you straight into the most chaotic, hilarious, and action-packed bar battles ever! If you’ve ever wondered what would happen if you walked into a bar full of drunk troublemakers ?, flying bottles ?, wobbling chairs ?, and wild characters who can barely stand… well, now you can experience it ALL—safely, virtually, and with maximum comedy!

title: Dummies World Cup
description: Dummies World Cup is a fun HTML5 football game for all ages! Choose your favorite team from 32 national squads and control your silly dummy player on a mini soccer field. Score goals, enjoy simple controls, and have fast-paced football fun. Easy to play, perfect for kids and families!

title: Forest Match 4
description: Forest Match 4 is back with the highly anticipated fourth chapter of the beloved Match 3 series! Return to the enchanting forest to collect juicy fruits, uncover hidden coin chests, and discover sparkling gems across 4,620+ exciting levels. Follow your fairy guide back to the charming village and journey along a beautifully crafted saga map. Can you complete level goals with limited moves? Use powerful boosters when you need an extra push.

title: Leap and Avoid 2
description: Get ready for another thrilling journey with the white ball! "Leap and Avoid 2" brings new caves, lab levels, and fresh mechanics. Discover secret paths, collect coins, and unlock powerful bonuses like speed boosts and shields. Jump on white platforms, avoid black ones, and explore in all directions to find exits. The more coins you gather, the higher you rank. Compete with friends and uncover every hidden treasure!

title: Save Seafood
description: Save Seafood is an exciting puzzle game where you help sea animals escape from being trapped in a tangled mess! The goal is to move and rearrange the animals to free them from the crowd. Solve each puzzle by carefully maneuvering the creatures until they’re all safely separated. Can you untangle the sea and set the animals free?

title: Jailbreak. Roblox jumper
description: In this thrilling game with a cubic style, the character attempts to escape from prison by progressing through levels, each represented as a separate platform. On each level, you'll need to collect coins that help speed up your escape, but be careful: dangerous traps and obstacles await at every turn. A wrong move or misstep could cost you your life. Navigate through each level, avoid the threats, and move closer to freedom!

title: Police Station
description: As the head of multiple police precincts, your mission is to boost the security rating in the district under your watchful eye. Begin your adventure by managing a modest police department, strategically hiring officers, and putting in the effort to cultivate a safer community

title: Pirates Mahjong
description: Pirates Mahjong is a classic tile-matching game featuring challenging levels. Match pairs of pirate-themed tiles to clear the board, solve puzzles, and uncover hidden tiles along the way. Perfect for puzzle enthusiasts and pirate fans alike, Pirates Mahjong offers endless fun and excitement on the high seas!

title: Cryptogram: Word Brain Puzzle
description: Cryptogram: Word Brain Puzzle presents a fresh take on the classic word puzzle genre. With an array of unique gameplay mechanics, hints, and events, players are immersed in an engaging experience. The game's USP is its diverse content, offering a wide range of quotes across various themes, from inspirational to literary and beyond.

title: Geometry Stars
description: Enjoy the Geometry Stars world with a brand new adventure! New levels, new music, new monsters, new everything!. Flex your clicky finger as you jump, fly and flip your way through dark caves and spiky obstacles. Collect many stars as you can to upgrade your famous characters and find the secrets of this Rhythm-based adventure.

title: Arrow Tap Puzzle
description: Arrows fill the board like traffic at a silent crossing. Some lanes are open, others blocked. Remove arrows one by one, avoid blocked paths and keep your daily streak alive. Solve the arrangement in front of you, then step into another.

title: Coin Merge
description: Coin Merge invites players into a captivating challenge of organization and strategy. Begin by sorting coins by color into designated slots, strategically merging them once a slot is filled to create new, uniquely colored coins. As levels progress, the pace quickens and the challenge intensifies, demanding swift decision-making and careful planning to keep up with the increasing complexity. Engage your mind in this addictive puzzle game where efficiency and foresight lead to mastery.

title: Geometry Rush 4D
description: Geometry Rush 4D is an exhilarating 4D platformer that takes speed, precision, and reflexes to the next level. In this fast-paced, action-packed game, you guide a customizable character through vibrant, geometric worlds filled with intricate obstacles and dynamic traps. The game's signature dash mechanic allows players to perform rapid movements, weaving through ever-changing environments with seamless control.

title: Tile Fruits
description: In Tile Fruits, embark on a delectable adventure packed with vibrant fruits and captivating challenges! This 2D tile-matching game tests your strategic prowess as you aim to connect three identical fruits to advance through progressively difficult levels. Each match removes the fruits from the board, but beware: having more than seven different types of fruits on the board at once results in a loss.

title: EQ Test Puzzle
description: A puzzle game that tests emotional intelligence through emotion recognition and jigsaw puzzles. Match emotional icons, scenarios, and puzzle pieces to train your emotional awareness and problem-solving skills.

title: Teacher Simulator
description: Teacher Simulator is a fun simulation game in which you play the role of a teacher. Mark exams and ensure the kids are on their best behavior. You may have been the student, but now you get to be the one in charge!

title: Zombies Weapon Merge 4
description: Zombies are swarming. Are you ready to fight back? Zombies 4 – Weapon Merge is an exciting shooting and strategy game where every decision matters. Match and merge weapons to create powerful guns, then aim and shoot endless waves of zombies. Combine identical weapons, upgrade your firepower, and place them smartly to survive tougher enemies.

title: Chroma Tower
description: Chroma Tower is a reverse-Tetris puzzle where you destroy instead of build! You're given a tower made of colored blocks. Drop blocks from above, match the color — and the entire connected chain disappears. Blocks fall to fill the gaps, potentially triggering new cascade reactions. Your goal is to demolish the tower completely within a limited number of moves.

title: Mr Disc: Slingshot Strike
description:
Mr Disc is here to strike! Swipe, aim, and throw powerful discs to smash enemies, break obstacles, and clear every level in style.
Easy to play, hard to master – can you become the ultimate Slingshot Striker?

title: Parking Frenzy
description: Welcome to Parking Frenzy, the ultimate test of precision, planning, and timing! Forget everything you know about driving simulators—this game doesn’t need pedals, steering wheels, or complicated controls. Just swipe your finger, draw the perfect path, and let your car glide into the parking spot. With a stylish 3D look, dynamic environments, and intuitive gameplay, Parking Frenzy delivers a uniquely satisfying experience that’s easy to play and hard to master.

title: Color Maze
description: In Color Maze your mission is to light up all the paths on the map to complete a level. Make the right move, avoiding obstacles or just pay attention to not get stuck in a corner. Beat all the 20 levels with increasing difficulty to show yourself that you are the real king of Color Maze.  Remember, if a level is to hard for you, you can always skip it clicking or touching the reward button in the up right corner of the screen.

title: Fill One Line
description:
Dive into the world of fascinating logic and test your mind in an exciting puzzle! Your task is to draw a line across the entire playing field, filling it completely, but keep in mind: there will be obstacles on the way that you need to bypass.

The game offers many levels, from simple to incredibly difficult, allowing each player to choose a suitable challenge.

title: Beat The Zombies
description: Beat the Zombies is a vertical action RPG blending strategy and adventure. Explore a dangerous plant-zombie world, fight through stages, and defeat all plant zombies in your way!

title: Fish Story 4
description: Fish Story 4 returns with its biggest underwater Match-3 adventure yet! Dive into over 4,500+ colorful levels packed with fun challenges, clever puzzles, and sparkling ocean treasures. Join your friend Mermaid on Daily Missions to earn coins, boosters, and special rewards every time you play. Take part in exciting Treasure Hunt events and uncover hidden pirate loot beneath the waves. Relax, match, and explore the deep blue sea!

title: Obby Parkour Racing
description:
Welcome to Obby Parkour Racing – the game where speed, agility, and style collide to create the ultimate racing challenge!

Jump, grind, and dodge through dynamic obstacle courses on your snowboard! Prove your mastery in a world where parkour isn't just on foot
it's on a board. Every race is a new test, and only the fastest and most agile champions will claim victory.

title: Steal Brainrot Original 3D
description: Buy rare animals—from the entry-level Nubini Pitzanini to Tralalelo Tralal and Los Tralaleritos. Place them in your base, create ideal conditions, and start earning! Each animal generates income ? and opens the door to new opportunities. Grow your collection, improve your infrastructure, experiment with your team composition, and increase your profits. Want more income? Buy new, rarer animals and build your financial empire.

title: Dreams
description: In the realm of slumber, dreams manifest as delicate tiles, each holding a fragment of imagination, memory, or longing. As a Dream Collector, your mission is to weave these ephemeral pieces together, creating a tapestry of wonder. Only by assembling the perfect dream can you unlock hidden secrets and awaken the Dream Oracle.

title: The Counterfeit Bank
description:
The Counterfeit Bank: Fake Money Tycoon Simulator
Think Plague Inc, but with counterfeit cash! Your goal: dominate the economy one fake note at a time.
Taxes are soaring, inflation’s out of control, and recession looms—perfect chaos for your evil plan. Print counterfeit money, outsmart enforcers, and flood the market with fake cash to disrupt the system.
Can you survive the chaos and take over the economy before time runs out? Mwahahaha!

title: Bricks Balls Breaker
description: Dive into Bricks Balls Breaker, an addictive online arcade game where precision and timing are everything. Launch the ball, shatter the bricks, and plan your every move to keep the field clear. Easy to play yet challenging to master, this free game offers hours of fun on both mobile and desktop. Can you clear every level before the bricks reach the bottom?

title: 4 Hexa
description: 4 Hexa is a fun, colorful online puzzle game! Merge same-number blocks to reach higher scores in this addictive math trivia challenge. Perfect for fans of block match games and brain teasers! Play now and test your skills!

title: GTA: Grand Vegas Crime
description: Grand Vegas Crime is an open-world action game set in a sprawling city inspired by Las Vegas. Players take on the role of a daring gangster looking to rise through the criminal underworld. The game offers intense missions, thrilling car chases, and fierce shootouts against rival gangs and law enforcement. Grand Vegas Crime delivers an adrenaline-pumping experience filled with crime, action, and adventure.

title: 2048 Run Gorgeous Balls
description: 2048 Run: Gorgeous Balls is a fun arcade game that invites you to chase high scores in a delightful environment! In this creative 2048-style game, you’ll control a colorful array of balls as they race along a dynamic track.

title: Love Tile Trio
description: Welcome to the Valentine's Day tile matching game! Your mission is to match and clear tiles from the board. Tap a tile and move it to an empty space or a spot with a matching tile.
