description: Discover the ultimate hidden object game! Test your observation skills by uncovering hidden items in fun, challenging levels. Relax and enjoy this scavenger hunt adventure with stunning puzzles. Focus on listed items, tap to reveal hidden objects, and race against time to unlock vibrant maps. Explore interactive scenes, solve puzzles, and prove yourself as the scavenger hunt master! Enjoy free gameplay, endless entertainment, and thrilling challenges. Play now and see what you can FIND!

title: ThumbPinball
description: ThumbPinball is an engaging physics-based pinball game that challenges players to manipulate various mechanisms and angles to achieve their objectives. Bounce the ball strategically to hit specific targets and tackle formidable bosses across exciting levels. Ideal for quick play sessions, it offers a blend of skill, strategy, and fun for all ages.

title: My Perfect Organization
description: Searching for relaxing casual games? Want to get a pastime challenge and leisure? Why dont you try this mini games collection-Home Packing! Here you will find ten more different kinds little puzzles full of packing fun, each has its own packing charm. No more brain teasers, just enjoy the fun of puzzle solving! Organize the whole house with your own hand, create a tidy life through organizing games and sorting games!

title: Transform Car Battle
description: you'll control a futuristic vehicle that can transform in an instant, speeding down tracks filled with obstacles and enemies. You'll need to swipe flexibly to dodge deadly lasers and traps while collecting energy cubes. At critical moments, tap the screen to transform into battle mode to smash through barriers, or switch forms to pass through special gates. Constantly challenge your reflexes, unlock more cool cars with unique transformation abilities, and set new running records!

title: Cubes 2048.io
description: Begin an exciting .io battle where Snake meets 2048 in a nervous arcade showdown. Control your cube snake, collect, merge, and grow bigger while outsmarting opponents in this classic action-puzzle game. Control your snake to navigate around the map. Collect more cubes and merge the same numbers to reach 2048. Match the same number to make it bigger.

title: Magic Tri Peaks Solitaire
description: Magic Tri Peaks Solitaire is the classic one lower one higher solitaire you know and love. It sounds easy: just remove cards from the board one higher or lower than the next card in the deck. But there's a whole other world behind these simple rules! The constantly changing locations and new cards on the board will keep you on your toes using new strategies. Don't expect to be an expert if you don't play for a couple weeks!

title: Daily Match
description: Connect tiles with a great number of pictures in pairs within the limited time. As you crush all the tiles on the board, you can win the level! Become a tile master level by level! Play faster and faster to train your brain and exercise the link technology!

title: Underwater Survival
description:
Dive Into a Mysterious and Beautiful Underwater World
Welcome to an unforgettable underwater survival adventure where exploration, discovery, and survival come together in a stunning ocean environment. Dive deep into a vibrant and mysterious sea filled with hidden secrets, breathtaking visuals, and endless possibilities.

title: Ballpoint
description: Ballpoint is a fascinating Arkanoid game in which you have to shoot balls from a cannon and hit all the targets. Colorful backgrounds, varied levels, many variations of levels and bonuses. Try to pass all levels!

title: Squid Game Memory Card Match
description:
Step into the thrilling world of Squid Game Memory Card Match! Test your memory and focus as you uncover pairs of iconic Squid Game symbols and characters. Can you keep your cool under pressure and match all the cards before time runs out?
Challenge yourself or compete with friends to see who can master the ultimate memory test. With Squid Game Memory Card Match, every flip brings you closer to victory or defeat – can you handle the pressure?

title: Wacky Strike
description:
This time you will choose who are you actually. Well, no. Who is the strongest! Girls, or boys! So, just build a lot of towers, and buy your cool enemy! Fight like the real hero and you will cope with it, just try it!

Are you a good fighter? Then this game is for you! Just pick a side, setup your troops, and fight against your mortal enemy, do you think that it is so easy?! Then march from your castle to the enemy castle claiming ground in between.

title: Find Sort Match
description: Find Sort Match is a fun and creative puzzle that combines sort and match elements. Let you experience the joy of DIY! In the game, sort and match items of various shapes, colors, and types. And complete each level of the challenge.

title: Soccer Euro Cup 2025
description:
Can you hear the deafening cheers of a mighty crowd? Get pumped for the Soccer Euro Cup 2025!

Pick your favorite country to represent and get ready for kickoff. Do your best to kick or headbutt the ball into your opponent's goal!

How many did you manage to score? Play now, and let's find out!

title: Fly Fly Fly
description:
Fly Fly Fly is a Flappy Bird alike game, where you have to fly through 30 different levels, avoiding obstacles an collecting berries. 
If you hit the ground it will be game over, if you crash on one of the earth worms around the level, you will lose a life. If you lost all your lives, it's game over. You can restore your health collecting the berries you will find around the level. Do your best and beat all the 30 levels and show the world what you really are!

title: Super Football Fever
description: We bring you an unprecedentedly realistic soccer experience with smooth motion-captured animations and lifelike 3D graphics that make you feel like you're on a top-tier league field. Build your dream team, sign superstars, and win matches with precise tactical arrangements. Whether it's quick short passes or stunning long-range goals, you can do it all with ease at your fingertips.

title: Steal Brainrot Eggs
description: Steal Brainrot Eggs is a competitive action game playable in both 1 Player and 2 Player modes. Players buy eggs from a central conveyor, carry them to their Base, and hatch random Brainrot characters based on egg rarity. Characters generate coins over time, allowing access to higher-tier eggs. Defend your Base from thieves or steal eggs and characters from rivals, customize your character, raise evolving pets, and take part in timed events across the map.

title: Pixel Fun Color By Number
description: Pixel Fun - Color By Number is a fun coloring game that lets you bring pixel art to life. With casual number-based instructions, you’ll fill in each pixel square to reveal stunning artwork.Each image is divided into tiny pixels. Each is assigned a number that corresponds to a color. For example, click on the city scene to fill in color and light up the street.

title: Daily Chess Puzzle
description: Enjoy over 700 daily chess puzzles in a sunny, beach-themed world. Lighthearted, relaxing, and perfect for summer fun anytime.

title: Tanks Merge: Tank War Blitz
description:
Embark on an armored adventure in Tanks Merge: Tanks to Attack on the Blitz! -
a strategy game where steel giants dominate the world.
Immerse yourself in a casual yet addictive tank simulation game
designed for those who love war machines and inventive tactics.
Have a blitz rumble and defeat all the bosses!
Your mission: control a fleet of tanks, each unique in design and
to defeat enemies and all bosses on the battlefield.

title: Mini Games Casual Collection
description:
Mini Games: Casual Collection is an online game. The gameplay is simple, fun, and addictive, so
you won't be able to stop playing. There is no stamina display. You can play anytime anywhere. You can use hints to help you pass when you are stuck on a level. If you have any problems playing this game or have any suggestions for this game, please leave us a message. If you like our games, please share them with your friends to double the fun!

title: Stack Sorting
description: Welcome to Stack Sorting! Your task is to organize colorful cylinders by clicking on stacks. Move the topmost cylinder to an empty stack or one with a matching top cylinder. Navigate through Easy Mode with plenty of stacks and time, or challenge yourself in Hard Mode with fewer stacks. Complete all levels within the time limit to emerge victorious!

title: Fix Da Brainrot
description: Fix Da Brainrot is a quirky jigsaw puzzle game with pieces that look like torn paper. Pick your challenge —16 pieces for a quick and easy fix or 32 pieces for a real brain teaser. Drag, drop, and fit the torn pieces together, and watch the picture slowly come alive as you fix the brainrot and conquer the puzzle!

title: Merge Town!
description: Ever wanted to be Mayor? Ever wanted to run a town, develop the land, and see a metropolis grow? Well, look no further than Merge Town!, the newest title from Gram Games. The concept of the game is simple - you have a plot of land, and it’s your job to turn it into a town. Every so often, you’ll be gifted with a house. Each house can be merged with other houses of the same variety to form a bigger home.

title: Screw Nuts & Bolts: Wood Solve
description: Embark on a Brain-Twisting Journey with Screw Nuts & Bolts: Wood Solve, an exceptional wood puzzle game about nuts and bolts to test your IQ brain power. For nuts and bolts lovers who likes challenge and innovative gameplay, the right game for you - the ultimate puzzle game - is here.

title: Office Pyramid Solitaire
description: Your objective in Office Pyramid Solitaire is to clear the card pyramid. On hard difficulty you must also clear the draw deck.

title: Tile Match: The Immersive Puzzle
description:
Match. Merge. Master the Tiles!
Dive into Tile Match: The Immersive Experience, a satisfying and relaxing puzzle game where your goal is to match three identical tiles to clear the board.
Use logic and strategy to complete levels — but don’t let the board fill up!

✅ Easy to learn, hard to master
? Addictive tile-matching gameplay
? Boosts memory and focus
? Perfect for short breaks or long sessions

title: Police Traffic Racer
description: Skid the wheels of 6 awesome police cars with insane speed limits and drive them through 3 landscape highways without crashing. Show how well you can steer the wheels of these amazing cars with roaring engines and conquer 3 awesome game modes. Use replenishing nitro to overtake slow cars and drive in speed at all times. Customize and upgrade your cars with the best upgrades and get the most out of all the cars. Are you ready to show your driving skills? Prove yourself in Luxury Highway Cars!

title: Moto Road Rash 3D 2
description: Rev up your engines and feel the thrill of the open road in Moto Road rash 3D 2! This high-octane motorcycle game immerses you in a heart-pounding racing experience where agility and precision are your best allies. Zoom through a dynamic, ever-changing cityscape, weaving between lanes, dodging traffic, and mastering daring stunts.

title: Jail Prison Van Police Game
description:
Get ready for action-packed gameplay! Take on the role of a police officer, drive the prison van, and ensure the secure transport of criminals in this exciting Police Bus Game

Immerse yourself in the intense world of law enforcement with the Jail Prison Van Police Game. Assume the role of a dedicated police officer tasked with transporting high-profile criminals in a specially designed prison van.

title: Teacher Simulator Christmas Exam
description: Welcome to the funniest and busiest Christmas classroom ever! Teacher Simulator: Christmas Exam is a charming and playful teacher class simulator where you act as a holiday teacher. Manage orders, hand out exam papers, grade tests, etc. Different classes are scheduled on different days of the week, such as art class, geography class, math class, and so on.

title: Kaboom Miner
description:
A fast-paced logical arcade inspired by classic Boulder Dash, but taken to the next level with massive chain explosions.
Your goal is simple—but dangerous: destroy all 50 explosive crates. Use falling stones, carefully placed bombs, and clever terrain manipulation to trigger devastating chain reactions. Every move matters. Push stones, move crates, build bridges from bricks, and even trap the Ghost before finishing it off.

title: Fun Obby Extreme
description:
Are you ready to experience an extreme game Fun Obby Extreme is a 3D parkour type game, little Obby needs you to help him jump across the platforms and reach the goal of each level.

Explore a sprawling city, level up and unlock new equipment, all while honing your parkour skills along the way!

title: Weaponsmith Evolution - Weapon Merge
description:
- Start with basic weapons and drag identical ones to merge them into more powerful versions.
- Each new weapon brings more gold.
- Spend gold on upgrades: unlock new types of weapons or speed up the merging process.
- Fight monsters and progress through levels.
- From time to time, you’ll encounter powerful bosses. Defeat them to prove your mastery!

title: GT Micro Racers
description: GT Micro Racers takes high-speed racing to a whole new scale! Control tiny but powerful GT-style cars as they speed through thrilling outdoor tracks made from everyday household objects. Race across books, cans, and wooden ramps in a sunlit backyard filled with grass, flowers, and playful obstacles. Drift through sharp turns, hit insane jumps, and outmaneuver rivals to claim victory

title: Sniper Freeze
description: Experience thrilling sniper action in Sniper Freeze, a unique online game where you hunt down moving rule-breakers marked in red. Sharp graphics and challenging gameplay await - stay alert and precise!

title: Ace Car Racing
description: Ace Car Racing offers high-octane city-avoidance action. Choose from sleek 3D modern sports cars across Seaside Roads, Exotic, City Racing, and Desert Trip. Collect lightning items for fuel, coins for upgrades, or splurge on new cars. Remember: diamonds unlock special vehicles. Invest in a superior car upfront and fine-tune its Acceleration, Max Speed, Wind Resistance, and Nitrogen. Skip the starter car—your race to victory awaits!

title: Fruit Mahjong 3D
description: Fruit Mahjong 3D is a relaxing puzzle game where you match pairs of fruit-themed tiles in 3D space. Rotate the view, find free tiles, and clear the board by matching identical pieces. Each level is handcrafted and fully solvable, offering a mix of easy and challenging layouts. The game starts with a short tutorial and gradually increases in difficulty. Use shuffle and hint buttons if you get stuck. Enjoy colorful graphics, smooth animations, and intuitive controls on both mobile and desktop.

title: Soccer Dash
description:
Soccer dash is a soccer game in which you swipe a soccer ball through obstacles and soccer players and hit the ball to score a goal.

You have drag controls, drag to choose the direction of the kick, and release to hit the ball. During the dragging process, the game goes into a slow motion state, so you can take your time to choose the direction of the kick.

title: Falling Art Ragdoll Simulator
description:
The harder they fall, the more points they get!

Jump in and enjoy the beauty of falling art! Because let’s be honest - there is nothing more satisfying than watching someone hurt themselves in the most dumb and ridiculous way. Especially when that someone is a 3d model with ragdoll physics and you don’t need to feel sorry for it at all!
 
Just enjoy our crazy game, have fun, and stay safe!

title: Men Vs Gorillas
description:
Men vs Gorilla – The Ultimate Evolution Battle!

Step into the wild showdown of Man vs Gorilla!
Upgrade your human’s strength, damage, and health to survive the rising fury of the jungle’s strongest beast. ?

Each level brings a tougher gorilla, smarter attacks, and intense battles but also bigger rewards!
Use your earnings to level up your power, evolve your fighter, and dominate every fight!

title: Magnet Truck
description: What happens if you take a car with a huge magnet? It could pull metal right out of the ground and rocks! Upgrade and get more and more expensive metals!

title: Crazy Plane Landing
description:
Flying is easy - but can you stick the landing?

Get into one of the amazing flying machines and launch as high as you can. This part is easy… well, fairly easy. Not that anyone can do it. But you can. Surely you do!

What’s really interesting is what happens next. Will you crash? Or will you somehow make it a perfect landing?

title: U Shape Puzzle
description: U Shape Puzzle is a free online browser game you can play instantly with no download or install. Slide U-shaped blocks by tapping to clear paths in this mobile-friendly brain game and logic puzzle that challenges planning and patience. Fast loading and unblocked, it works on desktop or phone so you can play at school or home. Simple one-touch controls make it perfect for kids, casual players and puzzle fans. Quick daily challenges and escalating levels keep the brain engaged. Try now anytime.

title: Mini Scrapbook Paper
description: Mini Scrapbook Paper is a super cute art game made for girls. Do you have a journal? Have you ever designed your journal with your own style? In this game, you can design a journal freely. With colorful pages, fancy stickers and other cute accessories we prepared for you, you can use your imagination as much as you like. Have a good time!

title: Solitaire Klondike - Treasure Island
description:
Set sail on a thrilling pirate adventure! Explore mysterious islands, uncover hidden treasures, and help a fearless heroine escape ruthless villains.
Customize your experience with beautifully illustrated card decks, stunning animations, and magical boosters to tackle challenges.
Relax between games with mesmerizing music and lively animated characters. Dive into a world of adventure, mystery, and enchantment!

title: Nine Cards Of Winter
description:
Get into the holiday spirit with Nine Cards of Winter, a fun and relaxing tile-matching game!
Pick up to 9 Christmas tiles and match 3 of the same to clear them. Watch out — if your stack fills up, the game is over!
Use smart moves to uncover hidden tiles, solve tricky puzzles, and enjoy cute holiday designs.It’s easy to play, relaxing to enjoy, and full of winter charm!

title: Sand Block Blast
description: Play Sand Block Blast free online and enjoy a relaxing browser game you can play instantly with no download and no install. Drop sand-shaped blocks, watch them crumble into grains, and clear lines in a clever logic puzzle that feels both calm and strategic. This unblocked game loads fast and works smoothly at school or home. Mobile-friendly and optimized for desktop and mobile, it’s a free online brain game perfect for quick breaks and focused play anytime.

title: Kingdom Wars TD
description: Welcome to Kingdom Wars TD, an exciting tower-defense strategy game set in a captivating 2D kingdom. Assume the role of a skilled commander entrusted with the defense of a mighty castle. In your quest, assemble a formidable army comprising up to five soldiers, including archers, warriors, and priests. Brace yourself for the challenge of surviving two perilous waves across various meticulously designed levels scattered throughout the map. Immerse yourself in this thrilling adventure!

title: Scary Teacher 3D Returns
description:
Start with the size of a board. A faint sound echoes through the hallway. You freeze, the heart is beating, and the house seems to breathe with you. You are inside the mansion of the old teacher once again.

In the 3D fear teacher, every shadow, every echo matters. Your goal is not to escape; it is mischief. But make an error, and you will become its next goal.

title: FNF 2 Player
description:
FNF 2 Player allows two players to play at the same time. Players can compete with each other by choosing the characters they want. The difficulty level can be determined by the music, thus appealing to all types of players.

Game Modes: 

- Story Mode: You fight with new characters weekly.
- Freeplay Mode: You can play by choosing the song you want.
- 2 Player Mode: It's time to duel with your friend.

title: Nuwpy's Adventure
description:
Nuwpy’s Adventure is a classic pixel-art platformer inspired by retro arcade games!
Help Nuwpy explore colorful worlds, collect coins, jump over enemies, and avoid traps.
Each level offers new challenges, hidden secrets, and a fast-paced journey full of charm and nostalgia.
Dive into the pixel world and enjoy simple yet addictive gameplay!

title: Super Tank Wrestle
description: Welcome to the world of tank battles, where you can control tanks to fight with other enemies on different maps. There are also a wealth of tanks for you to choose from!

title: Galaxy Carnage
description: Battle in space with countless enemies and their bosses coming in waves. Lots of weapons, lots of lasers, lots of explosions and effects. Upgrade the starship to the most powerful machine for exterminating alien invaders.

title: Cute Craft Lab
description: Step into the colorful world of Cute Craft Lab, a super casual game where creativity shines and every girl can become a true crafting designer. If you love relaxing gameplay mixed with adorable creativity, this cute design adventure is made just for you. In Cute Craft Lab, enter a magical workshop filled with charming tools, sparkling decorations, and endless crafting possibilities.

title: Cowboys Duel
description: In this fast-paced cowboy showdown, players can either compete solo or engage in a thrilling duel against a friend, testing their reflexes and quick draw skills. Will you answer the call to become the fastest and most skilled cowboy around?

title: Bento Match
description:
Slide the blocks to line them up straight and clear them!
If there’s space, you can move multiple blocks at once.
You can also move blocks without clearing them, but you’ll lose 1 life.
Earn coins based on your score and use them to collect new blocks!
Collected blocks will appear randomly in the game—rare blocks give higher scores!

title: Royal Bubble Blast
description: Welcome to Royal Bubble Blast, where you'll be transported to a majestic castle to enjoy a royal Bubble Shooter experience! Featuring vibrant, handcrafted designs and a colourful, lively theme, this game offers endless, relaxing gameplay accompanied by a beautiful soundtrack. Play as a King or Queen in the most exclusive Bubble Shooter enjoyed by royalty. Dive into a world of colourful bubbles and endless fun. So, what are you waiting for? Join the royals and start popping!

title: Superheroes and the Wand
description: You will play as a Wand character who had a strange dream about a sorcerer. Soon, in reality, the sorcerer from Stickman dream appears in the city and begins to do evil. Wand, together with the Superheroes, decide to teach the sorcerer a lesson. But not everything is so easy to do. The following superheroes are waiting for you: Blushing, Green Man, Bobo, Cudgel, Bruise, Flyer, Captain Captain and others. Among the enemies will be the Wizard, Anrik, the Clown and others.

title: Downhill Car Ride: Crash Test
description:
Put on a real destructive show!

Forget about safety, in this game you need to check how strong the dummy is. At your disposal is a huge pile of dummies, an abandoned town, an incredibly huge arsenal and complete freedom of action! In this game you can check what will happen if you crash a motorcycle at full speed into a house with dynamite or what will happen if you jump out of the car a second before the accident!

title: Griddlers Deluxe
description: Welcome to Griddlers Deluxe! Immerse yourself in a world of captivating puzzles. Uncover hidden images by deciphering numerical clues on the grid. With almost 200 challenges, Griddlers Deluxe offers addictive brain-teasing fun. Ready to decode the mysteries? Play now!

title: Last Standing
description: Players are dropped onto a map and start without weapons. The map is scattered with a wealth of weapons and equipment. Players need to constantly explore and collect these resources to enhance their survival ability and combat power. The core goal of the game is to be the last survivor. Usually, there are multiple players in each game, and they are randomly distributed on the map.

title: Farm Defense
description: Farm Defense is a fast, arcade-style shooter where you guard your ranch from waves of quirky mutants. Move between lanes, aim, and blast anything that crawls out of the burrows before it reaches your crops. Earn coins, unlock new weapons and gadgets, and power up your electric fence. Bright visuals, snappy controls, and escalating waves make every run tense and satisfying.

title: Ludo World
description: Experience endless fun with various vibrant environments, where every roll of the dice brings a new challenge. Choose between classic or quick mode, progress along the trophy road, and prove you're the master of the board with every move you make.

title: Block Combo Blast
description: Enjoy a classic block puzzle game with exciting jewel blast gameplay and stunning visuals! Solve 1800+ challenging levels, earn combos, and climb the global leaderboard. Train your brain, relax with soothing sounds, and compete with friends for the top spot!

title: Burger Day
description: Burger Day is a fun and fast-paced arcade game that puts you in charge of a busy burger kitchen. Stack ingredients to serve up tasty orders as quickly as possible. Your speed and decision-making skills are tested as customer demands increase. Satisfy hungry customers to unlock fresh challenges and advance through exciting levels.

title: Fishing Bear
description:
Tap to reel in your fishing line and catch as many fish as you can!
But stay alert—mischievous creatures in the sea will try to get in your way.
And when you pick up a mysterious Treasure Shell… something exciting might happen!
Enjoy a simple and addictive fishing experience!

title: Hazmob FPS
description: Hazmob FPS is an intense first-person shooter that blends tactical depth with fast-paced action. Players engage in strategic, team-based battles across diverse maps, utilizing customizable loadouts and a variety of game modes. With its dynamic gameplay mechanics, realistic graphics, and competitive ranked play, Hazmob FPS challenges players to master their skills, coordinate with teammates, and outwit opponents in a visually immersive and constantly evolving environment.

title: Wire Connect
description:
Captivating puzzle game where your task is to connect electrical devices to power outlets by drawing conductive paths. But be careful — electricity will flow along your lines, and if it touches water or bystanders, it will cause a short circuit!

Your goal is to find a safe route, avoid all hazards, and complete the level successfully.
Each new puzzle demands focus, logic, and precision. As you progress, the challenges become more complex, with more obstacles, devices, and tricky scenarios.

title: Grand Mahjong
description: Grand Mahjong is a captivating multi-level puzzle game based on the traditional Chinese Mahjong. Match identical tiles, clear the pyramid, and progress through increasingly challenging levels. This game is perfect for fans of logic games, brain puzzles, and anyone searching for a fun free Mahjong online experience.

title: Digital Aqua
description:
Digital Aqua is a digital aquarium designed for PC Browser.
Explore the vibrant world of aquariums, where colorful tropical fish and stunning underwater landscapes come to life.
Transform your Monitor into a serene and enchanting aquarium that fills your living room with comfort and wonder.

title: 4 Colors Card Mania
description:
4 Colors Card Mania is a thrilling and fast-paced card game inspired by the uno gameplay. Challenge against AI opponents in this colorful and strategic showdown.
Can you outwit your opponents and become the 4 Colors Card Mania champion? 
Shuffle the deck, deal the cards, and get ready for a colorful adventure!

title: Jump Man
description: A highly addictive endless jumper with a super cute but mischievous character! Chain combos and score as high as you can!

title: Bubble Shooter Neon
description: Bubble Shooter Neon brings vibrant neon colors and exciting bubble-popping action! Match and pop glowing bubbles before they reach the bottom—new rows appear every 15 seconds, so stay focused! With sleek, modern visuals and fast-paced gameplay, it’s perfect for bubble shooter fans and casual players alike. Sharpen your aim, beat the clock, and enjoy the glowing thrill of Bubble Shooter Neon!

title: Idle Archer Tower Defense RPG
description: Welcome brave archer heroes to the enchanting realm of Idle Archer Tower Defense RPG! Embrace the role of a solitary archer, unyielding in defending their towering stronghold against relentless tides of monstrous adversaries. With an unwavering determination, you pledge to safeguard the realm from the nefarious creatures summoned by the sinister dark Lord. Engage in a battle to fortify your tower, enhance the skill set of your valiant archers, and triumph over malicious waves of malevolence.

title: Traffic Escape Puzzle
description: Come to enter a complex maze in the Traffic Escape Puzzle! In this exciting puzzle game, get your car out safely. Find the right time to exit the vehicle. Be careful to avoid traffic jams and collisions. To slide the vehicle and create a clear path for cars. Each level presents a new traffic maze. And traffic flows become more and more complex. Come to use your ingenuity and strategize. Cleverly arrange all cars on a complex maze of roads.

title: Boom Stick Bazooka
description:
In Boom Stick Bazooka, an explosive online game where you may customize your bazooka and smash platforms and opposing stickmen, you're in for a wild ride. The black stickmen are stationed in towers, and if you pause for even a second, they'll open fire, attempting to wipe off your three lives.

In each level, you'll have three chances to aim and fire; you may always try again or purchase more ammo. If you want to kill foes quickly, blow up the barrels so they explode and knock down the towers.

title: Dolphin Dash
description: Launch your dolphin out of the water and smash through obstacles in this fast-paced underwater adventure. Collect coins, defeat bosses, and explore colorful ocean worlds full of surprises!

title: Stick: Tactics & Destruction
description: Stick: Tactics & Destruction! For fans of Stick War, Teardown, and Playground. Limited ammo, grenades, monsters, explosions. Destroy everything and win!

title: Idle Merge Car And Race
description:
An addictive idle car merging game. Build your own car racing company and grow your business.
Move your cars to the racing track and earn money every time they cross the finish line. Buy new cars (or collect them from the gift boxes), and merge the same level cars to upgrade into a new type. The better the cars, the more money you will earn. Use your earnings to buy upgrade packages in the Shop to help you make money faster! Become the richest in the world in this idle merge car game.

title: Sudoku Brain Blocks
description: Sudoku Brain Blocks is a relaxing yet addictive online puzzle game that blends classic Sudoku logic with block-fitting challenges (Tetris style). Drag and drop various shaped blocks onto a 9×9 grid to complete full rows, columns, or 3×3 squares to clear the board and earn high scores. Use strategy and planning to avoid running out of space and test your brain with every move!

title: Grow Wars.io
description: The battle between the heroes is beginning in the Grow Wars arena in this great io game! This battle is between the evolution heroes. Step into the arena and start slashing your opponents. Earn coins and buy new equipment or heroes in the shop. This battle can be played either single or 2 player. Call a friend and start playing together!

title: Space Shift
description: It's a game where you travel in space for as long as possible without hitting any obstacles- meteorites or missiles. Your ship moves automatically and you can slow it down to ensure it doesn't hit anything. There are different galaxies to travel through different in appearance and the type of obstacles to appear. If you travel far enough, you may encounter even an alien ship!

title: Soft Girls Winter Aesthetics
description: Hop on a plane and spend your winter vacation traveling around the world together with your favorite princesses. Discover fun winter activities and practice your fashion advisor skills while helping them choose their outfits of the day in the Soft Girls Winter Aesthetics for girls! Have a blast!

title: Tiny Baker Ocean Jelly Cake
description: Dive into a world of sweetness with Tiny Baker Ocean Jelly Cake! Create a shimmering ocean-inspired jelly dessert using playful shapes and colors, then decorate it with sea-themed toppings for the perfect underwater delight.

title: Tail Gun Charlie
description: Tail Gun Charlie: An Epic War Simulator. Experience the thrill of flying an airplane in Tail Gun Charlie, the ultimate war simulator! Complete challenging missions and blast your enemies out of the sky! Use flexible controls to master the air combat! Are you ready for the adventure? Download Tail Gun Charlie now and have fun!

title: Hill Station Bus Simulator
description: "Hill Station Bus Simulator" invites players to step into the shoes of a skilled bus driver navigating the challenging terrains of picturesque hill stations. As the primary protagonist, your mission is to efficiently transport passengers through winding roads, steep ascents, and captivating landscapes, while managing a thriving bus service. The game offers an engaging blend of realistic driving simulation, strategic decision-making, and immersive experiences.

title: Moto Stunts Driving & Racing
description: Moto Stunts Driving & Racing is a typical motorcycle-racing balanced game with 2D cartoon riders. On side-scrolling platform tracks, you need to arrive at the finish as fast as you can in both Racing Mode and Level Mode while keeping your rider alive. Try to earn coins and buy a new motorcycle first, the initial bike can only help you complete the game instead of making a new record for better rewards.

title: Little master of assembly
description: The gameplay of this game is puzzle assembly type, mainly according to the room suggested by the picture, according to the objects in the room, the use of parts to splice the room objects

title: Power Puzzle
description:
In Power Puzzle, you take control of a growing electrical network. Connect generators, route power through the grid, and bring every building to life — but every move matters.

? Gameplay
Connect power lines from generators to buildings
Manage limited connections and avoid inefficient routes
Every level is a handcrafted puzzle with increasing complexity
Multiple solutions are possible — can you find the most optimal one?

title: Counter Craft Sniper
description: Counter Craft Sniper is a first-person shooter where you step into the boots of an elite sniper sent to protect a city invaded by Minecraft mobs. Creepers, skeletons, and zombies have appeared in the middle of downtown, and only your precision and quick reflexes can stop them before the chaos spreads. Armed with your trusty sniper rifle, you must take position on rooftops and high vantage points to eliminate every hostile target that threatens the civilians below.

title: Cannon Blast - The Last Stand
description: You are in control of a cannon and the enemy army is marching towards you. You have to improve your skills, collect coins to buy upgrades, and never retreat because this is The Last Stand.

title: Cute cat's adventures
description: An adventure game for girls about a cat, with whom you have to go in search of kittens. Colorful levels await you, filled with traps, obstacles and secrets, as well as dangerous enemies who will try to prevent you from completing your main goal.

title: Drive To Survive
description:
Dive into the world of the zombie apocalypse, where your car is the only weapon!
Shoot down hordes of zombies, earn money and unlock new powerful cars.

Earn money - use your skills to become a master of survival!
Buy cars - from classics to supercars!
Explore new locations - each level is full of challenges!

Show the zombies who's boss!

title: Portals
description: Portals - HTML5 adventure-puzzle game where two heroes, one black and one white, are stranded on a mysterious planet filled with portals after being swallowed by a black hole. Your mission is to guide them through a series of challenging levels, utilizing their unique abilities to navigate this portal-filled world and find their way home. With intriguing puzzles, captivating graphics, and an immersive storyline, Portals offers a thrilling gaming experience for players of all ages.

title: Idle Pop Merge
description: Get ready for endless fun in Idle Pop Merge! Drag and drop characters into the slots to merge them into stronger versions. The more you merge, the more powerful your team becomes. It's a simple, addictive game that anyone can enjoy—whether you’re on desktop or mobile. Perfect for players who love puzzle challenges with a strategic twist!

title: Space Cleaner
description:
Space Cleaner is a casual space arcade game where you clear dangerous asteroid fields around your spacecraft. Use your mouse to destroy nearby asteroids, earn money, and survive as long as your fuel lasts.

When your fuel runs out, upgrade your ship’s abilities and return to space to continue cleaning the asteroid field. Destroy every asteroid to complete the stage and unlock the next challenge.

title: Ocean Pop
description: Ocean Pop is a lively underwater puzzle game where real 2D bubbles float, bounce, and cluster with natural physics. Pop matching bubbles, trigger chain reactions, and enjoy dynamic, ever-shifting puzzles. Its colorful ocean setting, smooth mechanics, and playful movement create a relaxing yet engaging experience that’s easy to learn and satisfying to master.

title: Jetstream Escape
description: Play Jetstream Escape free online and dive into a high-speed browser game you can play instantly with no download and no install required. This unblocked game loads fast and runs smoothly at school or home, making it perfect for quick breaks or long sessions. Race powerful boats, dodge coast guards, and outrun storms in this mobile-friendly arcade challenge. Designed for desktop and mobile players who love skill-based brain game style reflex tests, it’s a free online game built for pure,nonstop.

title: 99 Balls
description: 99 Balls 3D is an endless arcade game that mixes brick breaker and bubble shooter action in full 3D. Launch balls to smash numbered cylinders before they reach the bottom. Collect stars to unlock fun ball skins like sports balls, gems, or fruit. Simple to play, endlessly challenging, and highly addictive!

title: Jetpack Jump
description: Jetpack Jump is a fun and simple casual jumping game that lets you perform Olympic-style jumps with a little help from a jet pack strapped onto your back. Your aim is to jump as many meters as possible, constantly beating your best score. Your athlete will be rewarded generously in coins, which will help you upgrade and fly to even greater heights.

title: World Solitaire -Tripeaks-
description:
It is TriPeaks, one of the most famous solitaires in the world.
Take a step to go up and test your brain and luck
How far can I clean it?

title: Jelly Run 2048
description: Jelly Run 2048 is a challenging casual puzzle game that combines the classic 2048 number merging with exciting parkour gameplay. Guide your jelly block by swiping left or right to connect and disconnect cubes. Merge cubes to get double the number, reaching 2048 or greater. When the jelly block collides with tiles of the same number, they merge into a larger number.

title: Bubble Plopper
description: In Bubble Plopper you can either try to prevent the bubbles from filling the playfield in Classic mode or try to clear the playfield within the given time in Time attack mode. Shooting bubbles has never been so fun. Plop plop!

title: The Walking Deadblocks
description: A fast-paced, cooperative survival game where players battle relentless waves of zombies across dynamic day-night cycles. Survive as long as possible by managing resources, unlocking new maps, and utilizing unique character abilities. Nights bring increased danger with randomized enemy spawns, challenging players to strategize using generators and lights to stay alive.

title: Slinky Color Sort
description: Slinky Color Sort Puzzle is a relaxing color-therapy game where you sort bright slinky rings into matching stacks. Easy to play yet surprisingly challenging, it’s perfect for calming down while keeping your brain active. Enjoy smooth gameplay, colorful levels, and satisfying logic puzzles.

title: From Nerd to Popular Ballerina Cappuccina
description:
From Nerd to Popular: Ballerina Cappuccina is a makeover and dress-up game that follows a sweet transformation story. Ballerina Cappuccina starts as a shy, awkward girl with big dreams—and it’s your job to help her glow up and become the confident ballerina she’s meant to be.

Style her through each stage with fabulous outfits, stylish hairstyles, and elegant accessories. As you dress her up, she slowly sheds her insecurities and gains the charm and confidence needed to shine on stage.

title: Draw To Smash Zombie
description: Draw To Smash Zombie is an exciting drawing logic puzzle game where your creativity becomes the ultimate weapon against waves of silly zombies.

title: 67 Clicker
description:
Forget everything you know about gaming. Experience the absolute peak of interactive entertainment. It’s not just a number; it’s a lifestyle. Tap the 67 and watch your empire grow.

FULLY AUTOMATED STONKS: Buy upgrades to make the 67 click itself. It’s literally free real estate.

PEAK BRAIN ROT: No thoughts, just 67. The perfect idle experience for fans of "number go up" simulators.

title: 3D Maze Control
description: 3D Maze Control is a casual and fun puzzle physics game. Your goal is to rotate the board to let the ball reach its goal. The ball always falls down due to gravity and beware of scary aliens on the way.

title: Sweet And Fruity Makeup
description: From luscious watermelon pinks to zesty lemon yellows and tangy orange hues, this game allows you to experiment with a selection of deliciously scented cosmetics. Create stunning looks using fruity lip glosses, shimmering eyeshadows, and blushes that mimic the radiant glow of ripe berries. Let your imagination run wild as you mix and match fruity fragrances, adding a delightful touch of freshness to your final touch. So, get ready to enter a delectable paradise where sweetness meets style!

title: Hobo Speedster
description: Hobo Speedster is an exciting motorcycle platform BMX game featuring 2D cartoon graphics. Your mission? Keep the motorcycle balanced until you reach the finish line. As you earn coins and diamonds, upgrade your current bike at the motorcycle settlement, purchase 3 more motorcycles from the Shop, and unlock 4 additional riders in the Decorate section. Ready for a personal challenge? Explore various maps and aim to complete all 7 tasks for extra rewards!

title: OhPeach-It
description:
OhPeach-It is a game about dash&merge fruits that provides
you fun and engaging gameplay.

Game becomes more engaging when you use the idle mechanism and use power-ups.

So keep the fruits dash and merge !

title: Sticker Book Puzzle Color By Number
description: Discover Sticker Book Puzzle: Color By Number, a unique blend of coloring and puzzles! Match stickers, solve brain-teasing challenges, and create stunning masterpieces. Relax with calming artwork and enjoy the fun of adult coloring like never before!

title: Hungry Corgi - Cute Music Game
description: Hungry Corgi is a music game where you feed the dog to music and try to catch the rhythm of the cutest songs created especially for this game. A perfect way to relax and have fun playing the cutest while also challenging rhythm game. Join to corgi adventure to meet new friends by opening characters, listen to fun songs and unlock incredible themes that change everything!

title: Anime Couple: Avatar Maker
description: Anime Couple: Avatar Maker is your ultimate creative escape into the world of anime character design. Craft stunning anime couples with romantic flair, dress up stylish girl avatars, and mix and match accessories, hairstyles, and outfits. With relaxing ASMR touches and a vibrant anime art style, this avatar creator lets your imagination shine in every love-filled duo you design.

title: Sakura Branch
description:
The "Sakura Branch" is an interesting and beautiful puzzle game.

In the game you have pieces of a dry branch of a beautiful tree.
Turn them around and put them together.
If you combine all the pieces, life will return to the branch and it will delight you with beautiful flowers!
If you are new, you can play on a very small field on which there will be very little branches.
But if you feel strong enough, you can collect a whole tree on a huge field!

title: Neko's Adventure
description: Neko’s Adventure is a vibrant platformer starring Neko, a playful cat trying to rescue his girlfriend. Explore 20 challenging levels, unlock the Power Beam to shoot fire, and face quirky enemies in a whimsical, fast-paced adventure full of charm, excitement, and cartoon fun!

title: Barbee Black Friday Fashion
description: Get ready for a fashion-filled shopping day with Barbee Black Friday Fashion, the ultimate dress-up experience for style lovers! Barbee is hitting the mall for the biggest sale of the year, and she needs your expert fashion sense to shine. Explore chic winterwear, cozy sweaters, stylish boots, and dazzling accessories.

title: Mojicon Winter Connect
description:
The Mojicon series returns for the holidays! Match festive tiles, break the new Ice Sheet blockers, and enjoy a relaxing winter puzzle adventure. ❄️
Mojicon Winter Connect takes the classic Onet matching fun you love and covers it in a layer of fresh snow. Immerse yourself in a cozy holiday atmosphere, connecting festive icons like reindeer, gingerbread men, and happy snowmen.
Fast, satisfying, and full of seasonal charm – it’s the perfect winter puzzle for all ages. ✨✨✨

title: Flappy Rush
description: flappy rush is a simple casual game. touch to fly, hold to hover and release to fall. in this game your agility will be tested, pass obstacles and don't crash to stay alive, enjoy the music and complete levels that challenge your adrenaline

title: Beauty World and Fashion Stylist
description: Play stylist game just now! This is the most fashionable salon for girls, where you can not only do makeup, but also dress characters in nice outfits! Change accessories, hairstyles and interior, take screenshot and save stylish images to the gallery!

title: Cosmic Dash
description: Jump into Cosmic Dash – an endless space runner full of speed and challenges! Dodge debris, break through asteroids, and gather tokens as you race across the solar system. Use boosts, shrinks, and jumps to chase high scores and experience thrilling interplanetary action!

title: Heritage Mahjong Classic
description: Immerse yourself in a timeless Mahjong experience with Heritage Mahjong Classic. Featuring a single elegant layout, three unique tile skins, a time bonus for quick matches, and a competitive leaderboard, this game offers a simple yet captivating challenge. Perfect for players of all levels, enjoy a relaxing atmosphere as you match tiles, earn bonuses, and climb the ranks. Are you ready to test your skills and embrace the charm of classic Mahjong? Start your journey today!

title: Super Pop Blast
description: Get ready for a new kind of brick shooter, with unique mechanics, rewarding challenges, and colorful levels. The object: Clear all the blocks using a limited number of balls. Plan your moves, use the score combo system, and try to get 3 stars!

title: Frog Byte
description: Frogbyte is a game about a hungry toad sitting on a leaf that wants to eat all the flies flying through its swamp. Try to catch as many bugs as you can avoiding the bombs, otherwise it will be game over! Make the best score and share it with your friends!

title: Just Mahjong
description:
Immerse yourself in an atmosphere of tranquility with "Just Mahjong" — the perfect implementation of classic mahjong solitaire. Enjoy pure gameplay without unnecessary complications, where all attention is paid to the very essence of this famous game.

"Just Mahjong" offers:

Classic Rules: Authentic and time-tested mahjong solitaire gameplay.

Endless Enjoyment: Hundreds of carefully designed layouts guarantee long hours of play.

title: Car Simulator 3d & Car game 3d
description: In this school car parking simulator, you get to drive in the different car driving arenas skillfully with the various parking method and driving skills. Your love for 3d parking games will help you to play all levels and perform great driving in this offline parking game.

title: Ship & Fish
description: Ship & Fish is an exciting survival game where the player controls a ship and tries to stay alive by avoiding dangerous fish. The game requires fast reflexes and smart movement, as fish attack from all directions. The longer you survive, the higher your score grows and the more challenging the game becomes.

title: Horseback Survival
description: Embark on a journey of survival in "Horseback Survival," where you, as Zohan, share an unbreakable connection with your horse, Badal. Born on the same day, your unique bond becomes a lifeline when a mysterious event leaves you in a coma. Navigate a zombie-infested world. Engage in intense combat with melee and ranged attacks, outsmart the undead by staying stealthy, and overcome obstacles with strategic running and jumping.

title: GT Formula Championship
description: GT Formula Championship is an exhilarating high-speed racing game that brings the thrill of Formula racing to life. Step into the driver’s seat of the most powerful and technologically advanced Formula cars as you compete against elite racers on world-class tracks. With intense competition, realistic physics, and breathtaking visuals, this game delivers an adrenaline-fueled experience like no other.

title: Words with Prof. Wisely
description:
ind words by connecting letters. Improve your attentiveness, train your brain!

Keep in mind - some crosswords will be difficult to solve.

title: Yoga Master
description:
Yoga is a great way to improve your quality of life. It is also a great way to entertain yourself in this game: Yoga Master.

Yoga Master is an addictive 3D running game with different levels that will challenge even the fastest reflex.

title: Vehicle Fun Race
description: Vehicle Fun Race—an exhilarating arcade game with 3D stickman characters. Collect motorcycles, cars, boats, and helicopters to reach the finish line. No need to grab vehicles; your character can handle all terrains. Dive into water? No problem—control their swim. Special helicopters await on final platforms. Ready to race? Let’s roll!

title: Dop Puzzle Erase Master
description:
It is an interesting online game that will take you to an unparalleled puzzle-solving  experience. To solve the puzzles, you may use your imagination and ingenuity. You need to consider what do I erase to pass the level. Within the challenging levels, you  need to use strategic thinking to conquer each puzzle. In each level, you must make use of the
  eraser to erase a part of the picture to show a hidden object or scene. The deletion puzzles are  easy to learn, but challenging to master.

title: Knife Up 3D
description: Knife Up 3D is a casual game that tests your reflexes. Feel the rhythm, don't damage the ball and beat your opponents. You can unlock new skins with the rewards you get by passing the levels. It's time to test your reflexes, so if you find it interesting, don't forget to share it with your friends and join in! Have fun!

title: Bird Sort Challenges
description:
Bird Sort Challenges  is a fun and relaxing game where you sort colorful birds perched on branches, arranging them by matching colors.
Test your problem-solving skills as you strategize to ensure no branch overflows and complete each puzzle efficiently.
Whether you’re looking to unwind or sharpen your mind, Bird Sort: Color Sort Puzzle offers endless entertainment in a cheerful and visually pleasing world.
Good luck!

title: Airport Controller
description: Take control in Airport Controller Game! Manage planes, guide safe landings, refuel, repair, and board passengers while handling growing airport traffic. Test your skills in this fast-paced simulation and keep everything running smoothly. Play now!

title: Dynamons Connect
description:
Dive into the exciting world of Dynamons Connect! This fun and engaging game with adorable, colorful characters helps improve focus and visual perception.
Match identical tiles by connecting them with a path that has no more than two turns to clear the board. With endless levels, the challenge never stops!

title: Block Puzzle Travel
description:
The goal of the game is to destroy as many blocks as possible. By doing so, you will earn points for completing the game perfectly.
By solving puzzles, you train your attention, thought processes and brain.
In this game you have to achieve the maximum result, and pass all levels.

title: Stickboys Hook
description: Swing with Stickboys and jump your way to the finish line. Stickboys needs your help. Assist him and reach the goal! Jump from launch ramps and shoot webs to get to the end. You must complete every level. Be careful — if you fall from the sky, you lose the game.

title: Cube Speed Dash
description: Jump, dash, and survive in Cube Speed Dash, a high-speed arcade challenge where every second counts! Master lightning-fast reflexes as you guide a nimble cube through treacherous obstacle courses filled with spikes, traps, and deadly pitfalls. One wrong move—and it’s game over!

title: Design With Me SuperHero Tutu Outfits
description: Welcome to Design With Me SuperHero Tutu Outfits. We all love superheroes very much! Likewise, our favorite princesses are inspired more by superhero tutu fashion. They planned to organize the fashion events under this theme. Join and help each princess to pick a suitable superhero tutu outfit. Play them and have fun!

title: CUBE KING
description:
Show them who's the real King here!

New cubes appear from the portals at the bottom. Your task is to connect cubes with the same numbers by moving them from one stack to another!

You get coins for every merge. Use them wisely:
Upgrade a selected cube!
Unlock new portals with cubes!
Increase the starting level of cubes!
Extinguish burning cubes or instantly shatter the ice on all frozen cubes!

But be careful: if a stack overflows, the game ends!

title: Pixel Art
description: With pixel art, paint cubes with the right colors and create pixel art. the right colors and cubes are waiting for you to paint

title: Make Two
description:
In Make Two, your job is simple. Give each customer two of the same food! Drag the matching items to the hungry customers before time runs out.

- Beat the clock to clear each level
- Match food pairs to fulfill orders
- Earn coins for every satisfied customer. The more you serve, the more you earn!
- Use your coins to unlock new cute customers.

Fast-paced, satisfying, and easy to pick up. Make Two is the perfect bite-sized game to test your reflexes and memory.

title: Bffs Cherry Blossom Celebration
description: Step into the vibrant world of BFFs Cherry Blossom Celebration, the ultimate dress-up game where best friends come together to shine under blooming cherry trees! Pick your favorite crew of BFFs and deck them out in stunning spring outfits—think pastel dresses, floral crowns, and cherry blossom vibes.

title: Dog Escape
description: Welcome to Dog Escape, the hide-and-seek puzzle where saving a dog is only the beginning. Guide a lost canine through traps and guards, then bring it home to cuddle, feed, and style! If you adore puppy-care, dress-up, and dog games with heart, this is your new daily ritual. Rescue your puppies now!

title: Tap-Hold
description: Tap & Hold is a fast-paced neon cyberpunk flight arcade game. Hold to fly up, release to fall down. Navigate through dangerous obstacles, collect coins, grab power-ups, and unlock unique characters. How far can you fly?

title: Idle Farm
description:
Run your own successful farm and build an empire! The more you grow and harvest, the more money you get!
Use the money to upgrade your fields and make harvesting even more effective at producing food. Keep an eye on your production - with careful planning you’ll achieve everything! Expand your farm further and further until you truly own an empire.
Hire farm managers to do most of the work for you. Use their help to expand your farming empire, plant new crops and produce even more food!

title: Hexa Sort: Winter Edition
description: Step into a mesmerizing world of winter puzzles with Hexa Sort! More than just a game, it’s a journey into a frosty realm where every hexagonal tile sparkles like a snowflake. Match and merge the pieces to create perfect combinations, clearing the way for new challenges as snow crystals gently dissolve.

title: 2020 Connect
description:
2020 Connect is the most addictive logic puzzle you’ve ever seen! The player’s task is to place at least four blocks with the same number on it next to each other so they get merged. 2020 Connect takes the best ideas of games like Merged and 2048 and turns it into a total blast. Merging more than four blocks will reward you with coins that later can be spend to purchase cool boosters. 
Will you be able to get the legendary 8192 blocks to merge?

title: Jump Up 3D: Basketball Game
description: Jump Up 3D is a sports basketball game where you shoot to get that slam dunk, but the one hitch is you're doing it by jumping on a trampoline. Not your ordinary basketball game, this one promises and delivers the excitement! Take aim, bounce on the trampoline, and score baskets before your opponent. With intuitive controls and addictive gameplay, it tests your precision and unleashes your inner dunk master.

title: Block Team Deathmatch
description: Block Team Deathmatch is a first-person shooting simulation game. All models are made of pixel blocks including scenes, characters, and weapons. We have 4v4 Team Mode, Individual Mode, and Sniper Mode for you to select. If I were you, I would play the Team Mode first for better equipment, then challenge the other 2 modes when the rank levels up. If you never played any shooting games, I recommend you buy an auto-rifle to fight at any distance. Keep calm and shoot first!

title: Fruit Match
description:
A fresh twist on fruit puzzles!
Tap two identical fruits to detach them and send them falling into the basket.

But it’s not that simple — fruits follow real physics. They can get stuck, stack, and only fall further when you clear what’s below.
Use gravity to your advantage, trigger chain reactions, and watch satisfying cascades unfold.

Clear the board and keep the flow going as new fruits drop in!

title: Base Jump Wingsuit Flying
description:
Spread your wings and start flying like you’ve never been before!

Base Jump Wing Suit Flying allows you to take part in awesome and exciting extreme sports. Use Wingsuit to jump and fly over multiple cool environments and beat your high scores! This is the new kind of arcade flight experience!

title: Super Cloner 3D
description: In Super Cloner 3D, you are a unique super cloner on a mission to infiltrate dangerous environments. Use your cloning powers to escape traps, kill enemies, and accomplish secret missions.

title: Brainrot Ice Truck
description:
Step into the wild world of Brainrot Ice Cream, where over-the-top characters and ridiculous chaos blend perfectly with sweet, frozen treats!
Run your own ice cream truck, serving unhinged yet oddly charming customers with outrageous flavor combos, absurd toppings, and just the right amount of brain freeze.
Customize your setup, upgrade your gear, and keep up with the madness as each day gets weirder than the last.
Can you scoop fast enough to satisfy this wonderfully deranged crowd?

title: Sniper Wars: Find the Criminal
description: The snipers have begun the battle! Find the villain among the crowd of citizens and eliminate him. Take a rifle and go on a dangerous mission to find the criminal! You have a photo of the criminal and a rifle, find him and eliminate him!

title: Block Breaker
description: Embark on a 2D adventure filled with dynamic physics! Break ice blocks, use springs and portals, and launch the character through the air to reach the goal platform. Master the environment and discover all the creative ways to complete each level!"

title: Merge Hotel Empire
description: You can generate and collect different new items by synthesizing the same items, and then use them to create and decorate a new mansion for the hotel empire of the story.

title: Hair Stack 3D
description: Hair Stack 3D is a hair running game. Go through the numbered doors and collect more hair. Dodge the obstacles that make you less in number. Your ultimate goal is to make more hair so that the bald head at the end can have beautiful hair! Are you ready to help him? Let him applaud you!

title: Monster School Challenge
description: Complete teacher's assignments for evaluation, finding out who is a Noob and who is a Pro! Different tests and characters are waiting for you in the game Monster School Challenge.

title: Vex X3M 3
description: VEX X3M 3 is here! The most intense Vex hill racing experience yet. Race through new levels filled with traps, sand, electricity, and unpredictable terrain that test your timing and skill. Ride through pipes, master new physics, and take on hard mode or a CPU opponent. Unlock powerful bikes, beat every track, and prove you’re a true VEX X3M rider. Start your engine and take on the challenge!

title: Racing Master 3D
description: Racing Master 3D is a 3D racing driving simulation game that'll get your adrenaline pumping in seconds! Here, you'll drive ultra-cool cars at full throttle. Race through the fully immersive 3D tracks. Enjoy the realistic car driving simulation. Hit the nitro button and blast past every rival in seconds.

title: Cookie monster
description: What more could you ask for?! Puzzle, brain teaser, monsters, snacks...wait what? That's right MONSTERS and SNACKS! Feed the hungry monsters snacks to pass the level! You have to make sure all the snacks get into the monster's mouth though or you will see a sad face! Let's keep these monsters happy! If you like the game, leave us a review! That will help us continue to bring you many more challenging levels, new monsters, maybe some new twizzler lines.

title: Stickman Fight Pro
description: Stickman Fight Pro is an action-packed, fast-paced fighting game featuring simple yet intense gameplay. Players control a stickman character in a variety of challenging arenas, engaging in battles against other stickmen or AI opponents. The game emphasizes quick reflexes, strategic moves, and a variety of weapons and power-ups to outmaneuver and defeat enemies.

title: Vibrant Hearts Glamour vs Punk
description: Two best girlfriends, Lily and Roxana, are striking opposites. Lily is the personification of tenderness and romance, dressed in airy pink dresses decorated with sequins and floral patterns. Roxanne is the true queen of punk rock, with her black leather dresses, gothic earrings and bold hairstyles. But do not forget about the third girlfriend, Melody, who masterfully combines both styles. Players will be able to experiment with outfits and choose which one is best suited for Valentine's Day!

title: Back 2 School Makeover
description: Embrace the nostalgia and dive into our Back 2 School Makeover game, where you can fashionably express yourself, experiment with stunning looks, and relish into the feeling of heading back to school with style! Embark on a fabulous journey with our character, Amelia, as she transforms from an edgy e-girl to a chic, school-ready fashionista. Revamp her entire look starting with a haircare routine and a new haircut, a complete skincare routine, and a new, school makeup.

title: Backrooms
description:
Trapped in the eerie maze of the Backrooms, your only goal is to escape or survive, trying.
Play solo or team up with friends in this online multiplayer horror experience. Explore surreal levels, avoid lurking entities, solve puzzles, and use proximity voice chat to stay connected… and stay alive.

title: Romantic K-Pop Transformation
description: In this game, the stars of K-pop are preparing for a romantic transformation. Create a unique images for girls, full of tenderness and brilliance of the stage. Experiment with makeup; change the hairstyles and hair color of the girls. Choose the perfect outfit: from cute dresses and stylish tops to trendy skirts and trousers. Complete the look with fashion accessories. Compare the resulting images and decide which of the heroines of the game has become the real queen of romantic K-pop style.

title: Fat Cat Life
description: In this game you will have a bunch of cats to choose from, a huge selection of hats and a variety of tasks. From the simplest to the most difficult.

title: Dream Pet Hotel
description: Dream Pet Hotel is a charming connect puzzle game with an engaging hotel meta. Match tiles to clear levels, earn rewards, and unlock cozy rooms. Decorate and furnish spaces to create a unique style, then welcome adorable pets to stay in your hotel. Watch your collection grow as you design the perfect home for cats, dogs, pandas, and more. Relaxing, addictive, and fun to play online — build your dream pet hotel today!

title: Imposter 3D
description: Brace yourself for a thrilling challenge! Tap the screen to release balls and guide them into the holes each round. Afterward, head to the store to snag upgrades and cool items to power up your game. Complete levels, gather diamonds, and unlock permanent upgrades to boost your progress. How far can you take your skills? The further you go, the greater the rewards!

title: Smoke Trail
description:
Drift and earn in this fast-paced 2D endless drifting game!
Master the art of controlled slides across an ever-changing track. Rack up cash by chaining stylish drifts and maintaining momentum—then use your earnings to unlock a growing collection of iconic drift cars, each with its own unique stats and feel. But it’s not just about the money—complete challenges to test your skill, and unlock a special car.

Easy to pick up, hard to master—how far can you go before you crash?

title: Match Factory
description: Welcome to Match Factory - the most relaxing and non-stop casual triple puzzle game. Step into a vibrant factory full of colorful items, and play the role of a master matcher. Match three identical items to clear them from the board, pack them up, and keep the factory running smoothly! Every level is uniquely designed with tricky layouts and challenges. Use power-ups that help you overcome difficult puzzles!

title: Maze Cube 2048
description:
Dive into a world of challenging puzzles that test your strategic skills!
Become a true maze master! To conquer each level, you must carefully think ahead and plan your moves. The puzzles start easy, but watch out each new maze brings a greater challenge.

title: Kitty Match 3 puzzle game
description:
Kitty Match is a fun and addictive match-3 puzzle game with adorable cats. Match tiles, create combos, and clear levels in a relaxing and colorful world.

Easy to play and perfect for all ages. Enjoy smooth gameplay and endless puzzle fun.

Start your cute cat adventure now!

title: Watermelon merge
description:
In this exciting game you will plunge into the fascinating world of combining different fruits. When they collide, they combine to create entirely new fruit combinations.

Start your journey with small and juicy fruits, combine them to create larger and more unique varieties. Your goal is to reach the magnificent watermelon that will be the culmination of your fruit adventure.

title: Car Collision Master
description: Rev up for Car Collision Master Jagged canyons frame your blue jeep versus orange-black rivals on a looping desert track. Smoke trails and starry arches amp the chaos—customize your rig, battle friends, and dominate leaderboards in this wheel-warping thrill ride. Feel the V8 roar; claim victory in dust and daring!

title: Crazy Motorcycle
description:
Drive Nubik along exciting tracks. Jump over gaps, go around obstacles and reach the finish line! Lots of different levels, drive a motorcycle, get there without destruction.

You have to drive a motorcycle with a noob and get to the finish line.
Jump over gaps and go around obstacles at high speed.
Exciting levels are waiting for you!

title: Zombie Redemption
description: Zombie Redemption is an action-survival game set in a world where a failed experiment has turned most of humanity into zombies. Players earn gold by defeating zombies, which can be used to unlock stronger weapons. However, zombies also attack, making quick reflexes and strategic thinking essential for survival. Combining elements of strategy, action, and survival, this game offers an unforgettable adventure in the fight to save the world.

title: Hole Defense
description: Enemies are coming to capture your castle. You need to protect your people from intruders by using everyhing you have: Digging holes, upgrading and recruiting new soldiers and using your special abilities such as summoning an aircraft, hurling a lava rock, releasing bombs from your balloon bombers and freezing them all. Don't let them capture your castle at all costs!

title: Ellie And Friends Get Ready For First Date
description: Join Ellie And Friends Get Ready For First Date! Explore chic ensembles, trendy accessories, and glamorous styles to make a lasting impression. Dive into the excitement of the first date as these fashion-forward friends set the trend for the perfect look. Elevate your style game, embrace the thrill of romance, and let Ellie and Friends guide you through a fashionable journey to a memorable first date. Make every moment stylish and unforgettable!

title: Ammo Rush Master
description:
Get ready to run, multiply, and blast your way to victory in Ammo Rush Master!
Dodge obstacles, choose the right gates, and build the biggest Ammo army of bullets. Then, grab your blaster and unleash a storm of foam darts to smash through targets, enemies, and bosses!

title: Strawberry Hero
description: Stick your fork and climb to the top! Hold down to keep sticking the fork continuously. If your fork hits a hero or an obstacle, it’s game over! Stick the fork just above the falling hero’s feet to trigger a Super Jump and earn a high score!

title: Sprunki Garden
description: Welcome to Sprunki Garden – a wild match-3 puzzle adventure inspired by the legendary Sprunki meme! Match colorful Sprunki characters across 100 hilarious levels filled with chaos, charm, and absurdity. Every move connects you with the bizarre Sprunki universe, where each character is weirder than the last. Get ready to swipe, match, and laugh your way through the most brainrotted garden ever!

title: Uncle Bullet 007
description:
Play as Uncle Bullet, a retired spy who’s back in the game to take down rival agents and save the day. Armed with an arsenal of bouncy bullets, you’ll use your wits and quick reflexes to outmaneuver foes and rescue hostages.

Shoot your bullets at walls, ceilings, and floors to make them bounce, ricochet, and curve around corners to hit your targets.

title: Gold Miner Tower Defense
description: Gold Miner Tower Defense is a wonderful combination of tower defense, card strategy and upgrade combat. You will play as a brave miner protecting gold from enemies. Protect your precious treasures strategically with many unique defense towers!

title: Rooftop Challenge
description: Rooftop Challenge is an exhilarating parkour adventure where players must leap, climb, and strategize their way through a sprawling urban landscape. Starting from ground level, the goal is to find the elusive "house" that serves as the gateway to even greater heights. Once found, the journey continues as players ascend rooftop after rooftop, navigating complex jumps, narrow ledges, and towering structures.

title: Duet Cats Halloween Cat Music
description: Welcome to Duet Cats Halloween Cat Music, a game feast for 2 players filled with fun and music!Join your friends in this Halloween-inspired game to challenge the cat's music and have fun! With the rhythm of the music, control the cute cat to move. Let them eat more ice cream. You can choose a different musical challenge. You should accurately move to collect ice cream, and get the highest high score!

title: Relax Mini Games Collection
description: This is a collection of creative and fun mini-games. The game contains a variety of modes, you can DIY ice cream, have cooking for mooncakes, design a car of your favorite, and so on. You cant miss our game if you want to find some relaxation in your busy life.

title: Halloween Challenge
description: Get ready for a spooky adventure in Halloween Challenge! Bats are flying through the night, carrying candy that you must protect. Your mission? Tap the bats before they escape with the sweet treats. But beware, if even one bat escapes, the game is over! With simple controls and addictive gameplay, Halloween Challenge offers a fun and fast-paced experience for players. Test your reflexes, compete for high scores, and enjoy the eerie Halloween atmosphere. How long can you defend the candy?

title: Slippery Drift Racing
description: Slippery Drift Racing is an adrenaline-pumping racing game where precision and speed go hand in hand. Players can choose between Race and Time Attack modes, tackling five unique and challenging maps. With three difficulty levels—Easy, Normal, and Hard—drivers of all skill levels can enjoy sliding through tight corners, mastering drifts, and racing against the clock or opponents. Perfect for fans of high-speed thrills and skillful maneuvers, every race promises excitement and challenge!

title: Agent Squad
description:
Looking for an engaging casual shooter that’s easy to get the hang of but offers engrossing action and real tactical challenges? 
Agent Squad is a top-down shooting game with intelligent mechanics, loads of cool upgradable guns, and addictive gameplay

title: Idle Lunch
description: Idle Lunch is a fun and casual idle game where your mission is to take big bites and earn coins! Start your journey with a simple burger, tapping to take each bite and build your fortune. As you accumulate coins, unlock new delicious foods to keep the fun going, from pizzas to fancy desserts. The more you bite, the more you earn! Invest your coins in powerful upgrades that boost your earnings, allowing you to munch faster and grow your wealth even quicker.

title: Farm: Merge Harvest
description: Transform your land into a beautiful farming haven. Start with a small plot and grow it by merging crops, designing structures and unlocking new areas. The more you build, the more surprises await, bringing new rewards and adventures at every stage!

title: Kingdom Cats
description: Become friends with the King of Cats and build a whole kingdom together! Dive into a colorful, exciting world where you can fully demonstrate your creativity!

title: Steal Items io
description:
Grab everything in your hands and steal items!
You play for a flexible and funny stickman who can't stand on his feet straight. You need to run faster to the largest and most expensive items in the houses, grab them and deliver them to the truck.
You have to steal a lot of items, because besides you, there are other stickmen running around the house who also want to rob this house. Beat them on points and collect more furniture.

title: Atlantic Sky Hunter Xtreme
description: Embark on an adrenaline-fueled journey across the open Atlantic ocean in Atlantic Sky Hunter, an arcade endless shoot 'em up airplane game where you'll face off against challenging UFOs and formidable bosses, armed with an array of power-ups including spray bullets, extra health, and twin missiles; how high can you soar in this thrilling shmup adventure?

title: Mahjong 3D Match
description: Welcome to the 3D Mahjong adventure! Challenge your mind with speed and precision. Plan your moves, view the board from all angles and remove pieces intelligently. Beat increasingly difficult levels, play offline and relax with immersive music.

title: Home Rush The Fish War
description:
Engage in an epic battle between Humans and The Fish!
Your goal is simple: drag and hold to move the Human to the perfect spot to defeat The Fish. Watch out for obstacles and tough enemies along the way. Take down The Fish, then return safely to the starting point. But remember, only Humans of the same color can defeat The Fish! Experience exciting levels with increasing challenges, stunning 3D visuals, unique characters, and easy-to-learn controls for all ages.
Enjoy the adventure!

title: Friday Night Sprunki
description: Take on the challenge of a rhythm-based rap battle against many famous characters and hit the correct arrow keys in time with the music that starts playful and energetic but takes on a haunting vibe halfway through. Complete every level to beat the other characters and reach the best score on every Friday weekend. Complete all weeks and be part of the memorable and immersive experience.

title: Nubik in the Monster World
description:
Nubik saved the kittens, but the monsters are back! Evil Huggy has kidnapped them again!
Now Nubik has new weapons: AK-47, M16, grenade launcher, machine gun, and shotguns!
Help him rescue the kittens, collect loot, earn coins, upgrade, blast TNT, and escape traps. Even his friend gets captured—help Nubik save him too!

title: Idle Game Prison Life
description: Ever dreamed of running your prison? Now’s your chance! In this casual idle simulator, you’ll create a high-security prison empire. Upgrade and expand until you are on your way to becoming a tycoon! Create the perfect prison layout with cells, kitchens, gyms, and surveillance! Recruit guards, medics, and more to keep things under control.

title: Wood Block Puzzle 3
description: Wood Block Puzzle 3 is a polished, relaxing 10×10 wooden block game featuring a fresh UI, smart boosters, and satisfying break animations. Drag shapes from the right tray, complete rows or columns to score, and chase your best record. Use boosters at the bottom—watch rewarded ads to earn coins and unlock boosters when needed. Simple to learn and hard to master, it’s perfect for quick breaks or long zen sessions.

title: The Branch Runner
description: Are you good at endless running arcade games? Here is a chance for you to play a funny running arcade game with 3D pixel blocks.
