You need to help the character run forward by means of rotating the platform track and avoiding the obstacle blocks. There are many beautiful skins in the shop. As long as you earned enough gold coins, you could unlock and use them!

title: Art Salon
description: Welcome to Art Salon - Makeup & Nails, where your creativity knows no bounds! ? Whether you're passionate about fashion, beauty care, or just looking for a fun, relaxing game, this is the perfect app for you. From designing acrylic nails to creating stunning makeup looks, step into a world of endless beauty transformations in 3D! ??

title: Crazy Fruit Merge
description: Looking for the perfect relaxing game? Sometimes all you need is a fun puzzle. Merge fruits, challenge your mind and use power-ups to keep the game flowing. Progress further and aim for the highest score!

title: Dance On Hotsteps Mobile
description: Welcome to Dance On - Hotsteps Mobile, a modern dance game that you can play for free on H5games4u. Dress up your superstar in beautiful suits and dresses, follow the beats of the music, make perfect dance moves, and surprise the crowd in the dancing show!

title: Stickman The Flash
description: Stickman The Flash is a fighting RPG arcade game with 2D stickman warriors. In the Survival Mode, you need to survive as long as you can by dodging red areas and killing incoming enemies. You can collect different weapons when you kill the corresponding enemies. When you earn enough gems, you can unlock and equip them in the Equipment Store, and they will increase your full abilities. Keep calm and slaughter them all!

title: Fill & Sort Puzzle
description: Fill & Sort Puzzle is a cozy puzzle game where players have to sort, stack, and pleasantlarrange household items while watching for a naughty cat who likes to make things messy!  Many small details need to be paid attention to in the levels. For example, when organizing the shoe rack, don’t forget to clean the dirty shoes before storing them. Do you need a hint? Watch the video for tips.

title: Stickman Sort
description: Play Stickman Sort Puzzle free online and enjoy a clean, addictive browser game you can play instantly with no download and no install. Sort colors, shapes, and items in a satisfying logic puzzle that doubles as a relaxing brain game for all ages. This unblocked game loads fast and works smoothly at school or home, perfect for quick breaks. Fully mobile-friendly and optimized for desktop and mobile, it’s a free online game built for simple, smart fun anytime.

title: Doggo Jump
description: "Doggo Jump" is a charming hyper-casual platform game where players controls a playful puppy as it hops between platforms, collecting bones and racking up points. With simple tap-to-jump mechanics, colorful graphics, and an adorable dog character, the game is easy to pick up and addictive, making it perfect for quick gaming sessions.

title: Erase the extra element
description: Sharpen your focus and logic in Erase the Extra Element! Erase parts of each scene to reveal clues and solve tricky visual puzzles.

title: Labubu And Me
description: Play this fun game for girls where you style your own Labubu monster and yourself! Customize Labubu with fur colors, eyes, tops, stickers, and accessories. Then, match your makeup and outfits to create the ultimate twin look. From trendy dresses and cute bags to stylish hairstyles, show off your fashion skills and creativity. Perfect for fans of Labubu games and makeover fun!

title: Farmer Pedro
description:
Get ready to till the soil and reap the rewards in Farmer Pedro!

In this charming 3D farming simulator, you’ll take on the role of Pedro, a humble farmer with a big dream - to build the most bountiful farm in the countryside. Start by driving your trusty tractor around the initial plot of land, harvesting a variety of crops like corn, tomatoes, carrots, and more.

As you grow and harvest your crops, you’ll earn cash that can be used to expand your farmland and unlock access to new crops.

title: Brawler Man: Fist of Fury
description:
Hooligans have taken over the city streets. Join the battle for order in the city!

You are a street fighter and want to protect your city from the invasion of hooligans! You will have to visit every corner of the city. Clear the streets of criminals and hooligans with the help of your fighting skills! Deliver cool blows, combine blows to get crazy techniques! In this battle, every blow is important, train to fight back against hooligans and their Bosses.

title: Rabbit & Carrot
description: Help the rabbit collect all of the carrots on each level and get to the flag. Lots of spikes and spiky enemies to avoid. Open gates and use bubbles to float across the screen. 48 challenging levels in this fun platformer.

title: Cute Folding Paper
description: Cute Folding Paper is an origami online puzzle game. Combines the creative fun of paper crafts with challenging logic puzzle challenges, making it the perfect game for kids and family play .Perfect for children and good for practicing logic, reasoning, and problem-solving skills. Step by step, solve puzzling origami puzzles where the order of folding is the key to clearing the level.What are you waiting for? If you like our games, please share them with your friends to double the fun!

title: My Perfect Mine
description:
Become the leader of the Mining Empire!
You are the head of the mining business. There are several workers under your leadership. Send them to the mine to extract a valuable resource - gold. But not everything is as monotonous as you might think!

title: My Cottagecore Aesthetic Look
description: Welcome to the My Cottagecore Aesthetic Look game. Cottagecore fashion is inspired by farm life, it is very impractical for doing chores around the farm! Princess Elsa, Anna, and Ariel are best friends planning to try something special. Get ready to explore the Cottagecore fashion style along with them to create the cutest looks!

title: Dragon Island Idle 3d
description: Welcome to Dragon Island Idle 3D, a casual idle 3D world. Raise your dragons and build a wonderful island empire. Unlock all facilities to get income. For example, unlock a new pasture to raise more dinos. Unlock synths for the new area. Unlock the incubator to get dinos.

title: Key Quest
description: Golden Key is a challenging escape game where you must solve a series of puzzles to escape mysterious rooms. Use logic and memory to find useful items, uncover secrets, and solve clever riddles until you discover the Golden Key.

title: Funny Balls 2048
description: Funny Balls 2048 combines the 2048 genre with physics. Drop bouncing balls so that to collapse them with identical ones and get a ball of 2 times more value. The game has boosters that will make the game more exciting, as well as different ball skins.

title: Ragdoll Football 2 Players
description: Ragdoll Football 2 players is an exciting and fun sports game in which you can feel like a real football player! Fight with friends or the computer by controlling a ragdoll stickman on the football field. Show your skills and wit to score grand goals and become a champion.

title: Winter CosmoFest
description: Immerse yourself in a magical winter adventure in the Honkai universe. Show your creativity by creating festive cosplay outfits for the heroes of the game. Combine gorgeous costumes, accessories and hairstyles to capture the spirit of your favorite characters among snowflakes and winter landscapes. Show off your fashion skills by choosing the perfect ensemble for the winter cosplay festival. Win the hearts of Honkai fans and share your ideas with your friends!

title: Block Blast 2048
description: Block Blast 2048 is a fun and addictive puzzle game where you merge blocks with the same number to create higher values. Keep merging to boost your score and face increasing challenges. How far can you go? Can you reach the ultimate block? Play now and test your puzzle skills!

title: Relay Race
description: Relay race game is an engaging and addictive game that combines puzzle solving elements, casual gameplay and exciting race challenges. This game offers players a unique combination of fun puzzles and trolls for a thrilling and engaging gaming experience.

title: High Heels Collect Run
description: Ready to begin a stylish running adventure in High Heels Collect Run! In this casual game, you’ll run through various fun environments. Stepping on heels can make you feel like a queen! Everyone loves to look perfect, and these heels will make you shine like a star!

title: Hexa Blast Game Puzzle
description:
Hexa Blast Game Puzzle is a fun and challenging game! Try to find the right combination of hexa puzzle. Just drag and drop all the hexa block game on the board. The rule is simple: everything must fit! Enjoy the satisfaction of pieces fitting neatly in place.
Our unique hexagonal pieces will stretch your mind in ways you never imagined in this addictive hexa block puzzle game.
Keep your brain active and sharp, analyze all the possibilities and try to finish all puzzles.

title: Fillwords: Find All the Words
description:
Fillwords: Find All the Words - the ultimate word search puzzle for intellectuals and word game enthusiasts! Find the hidden words in the grid of letters. Train your brain, boost your memory, and expand your vocabulary.

Various Themes, every time different word combinations
Enjoy a vibrant and intuitive interface
Use hints
Offline Play: Enjoy the game without the internet connection
Vocabulary enrichment
Suitable for all ages

title: Holiday Hex Sort
description: In Holiday Hex Sort, drag and drop hex tile stacks onto the board. Merge tiles to form stacks of 10 and collect them. As levels progress, more tile types appear. If there are 10 similar tiles on a stack, they will be collected. Clear all tiles by making stacks of 10 before time runs out !

title: Elementz
description: ElementZ is a Match-3 game similar to Bejeweled or Candy Crush. Its particularity lies in giving each color its elemental power, allowing you to trigger different powers of fire (red), water (blue), earth (brown), plants (green), and electricity (yellow).

title: Natural disaster survival Obby
description:
Immerse yourself in an exciting Roblox-style adventure with the game “Natural disaster survival Obby”! 

Dynamic maps are waiting for you, where disasters are happening every second - lava flows, floods, tornadoes and much more. Pass the obby trials, dodge the dangers and try to survive the longest! 

Play online with friends and other players from all over the world. 
Unlock stylish skins and unique pets to stand out from the rest.

title: Jump In To The Plane
description: Want to feel like a super agent? Jump into a plane with your car! Race against time, perform crazy stunts, and wreak havoc in this insane game. Buckle up and put the pedal to the metal! Explore dozens of locations and vehicles. One wrong move and you're gone! Hurry, you've got a plane to catch!

title: House Robber
description: House Robber is a free online game with the theme of a robber for boys. In the game, you will play a robber, sneak into the house and steal all kinds of goods. Be careful to return after you get it, and don't be found by the security guard. Each level has its own scene, so you must be careful in stealing. The whole process is very exciting, are you confident to surpass it? Come and challenge!

title: Lulus Fashion World
description: Welcome to Lulu’s Fashion World. Can you battle to become the top fashion designer? Collect stars, progress through cities and events. Choose from clothes you own from plenty categories. Style outfits your way and save them to use whenever you like. The combinations of clothing and makeup are at your fingertips to experiment and create unique trends that could become the new fashion trend. Experiment with new looks and create a fad. So, are you ready to be the new fashion icon ?

title: 3D Kid Sliding Puzzle
description: We've taken the classic sliding puzzle into a whole new 3D world. Kids will need to slide the scrambled blocks to rearrange them and complete adorable cartoon pictures, such as little animals, vehicles, and fairy-tale characters. The game features vibrant colors and lively 3D models that will immediately capture a child's attention. Not only does it provide hours of fun, but it also helps develop a child's logical thinking, spatial awareness, and problem-solving skills.

title: Stickman Warrior Way
description:
Epic battles, complex labyrinths with multiple paths and treacherous enemies await you in the game!

You will have to pass difficult tests in the fight against an ancient evil that wants to destroy all existing worlds.
 Only you can prevent the destruction of the universe and save other worlds from destruction.

18 challenging levels and mazes are waiting for you.
2 or more ways to pass the level
Save this world to give the rest of the universe a chance!

title: NinjaRoof
description: NinjaRoof is a fast-paced and addictive arcade game where players control a nimble character jumping from rooftop to rooftop while avoiding deadly obstacles and aiming for the highest score. Test your timing, precision, and reflexes in this endless jumping adventure built with smooth physics and clean visuals.

title: Obby: Pogo Parkour!
description: Obby: Pogo Parkour! is a dynamic arcade game where you control a character on a pogo stick, overcoming various levels filled with obstacles. Buy and upgrade your pogo sticks to complete challenges faster and more efficiently. Compete with players from all around the world and aim for the top of the leaderboard. Dive into the thrilling world of parkour on a pogo stick and test your reflexes in Obby: Pogo Parkour!

title: Tower Guardian - Epic Defense
description:
- Strategically summon warriors and unleash devastating abilities to protect your tower from hordes of enemies!
- Fight off waves of monsters, unlock new levels, and upgrade your heroes as you rise to become the ultimate protector. Every wave gets tougher—only the strong and strategic will survive.
- Rotate around the tower, lock onto approaching foes, and eliminate them before they breach your defenses! 
With each wave, enemies grow stronger and more numerous.

title: Sprunki
description: Sprunki Challenge is a fun and character interactive music game where you can develop your rhythm skills. Mix rhythms, sounds and characters to create completely original tracks with instantly interacting characters. Drag-and-drop game mechanics allow for an unlimited number of combinations. This way, you will never get bored and create new rhythms and music every time you play. For the horror theme, you can drag the black button onto the character.

title: Monster Makeup 3D
description: Show off your makeup skills by helping monsters blend seamlessly into human society. Protect them by keeping their true identities hidden from angry mobs. Transform monsters to hide in plain sight, ensuring their survival. Customize their look by choosing skin color, changing eye lenses, adjusting their teeth, and adding the perfect wig to complete their human disguise. But be careful—make a mistake, and you might become the monster's next meal!

title: Zombie Terminator
description: Zombie Terminator is an exciting first-person shooter game where players take on the role of a survivor in a world overrun by a zombie outbreak. Players must survive and hunt zombies in this post-apocalyptic setting. The game attracts numerous players with its intense combat experience and rich weapon system.

title: Wired Chicken Inc
description: Wired Chicken Inc is a fun casual game on yad.com. Do you dream of being a relaxed and free farmer and managing your farm? In this game, you can realize your dreams. At the beginning of the game, you only have one duck egg. The duck egg hatches a duckling, and the duckling then produces a duck egg. See what you can get in the last, enjoy!

title: Mahjong Four Rivers
description: Discover the engaging world of Mahjong Four Rivers – a fresh take on the classic puzzle game. With its traditional charm and modern gameplay, it’s perfect for sharpening your observation and strategy skills. Enjoy beautifully designed tiles and the rewarding challenge of clearing the board. Play for free on your phone or computer, wherever you are.

title: Fusion 2048
description: Fusion 2048 is an addictive puzzle game where you combine matching numbered blocks to reach higher values and aim for the elusive 2048 block. Play in Classic or Shape Mode, plan your moves to avoid filling the container, and use TNT blocks to clear space. With clean visuals, smooth controls, and score tracking, it’s perfect for quick sessions or long strategic runs—easy to pick up, hard to master.

title: Farm Mahjong 3D
description: Have you ever imagined playing your favorite 3D mahjong game in a farm setting? Mahjong 3D Farm does just that! It brings the popular Mahjong 3D game into the charming world of farms, filled with adorable animals, crops, and farming tools for you to match! So why wait? Play Mahjong 3D Farm Connect now and solve the puzzle amidst the fields!

title: Racing Car Destroying Zombie
description:
Zombie Racing Car fast-paced physics-based racing game. You’re in for the ride of your life through a zombie apocalypse!

Drive your car through deserts, forests, abandoned city,...surrounded by zombies, earn cash, upgrade your car powerful ones. Steer your car to keep balance on the hills while trying to smash zombies into debris. It's you against a boatload of super-strong zombies!

title: Hex Planet Idle
description: Hex Planet Idle is both an RPG adventure game and a survival idle game with 3D models. You can control a stickman warrior to discover the whole universe by collecting resources and unlocking new areas. When you step on the white lighting areas, you will know the resource request of the next area. Get close to any items to collect them automatically. If I were you, I would unlock all areas because of the plentiful resources.

title: Asoka Makeup Indian Bride
description: Immerse yourself in the colorful world of the Indian wedding tradition with Princesses Jacqueline and Eliza! Help them create the perfect wedding look with the help of various cosmetics and accessories. Use bright shadows, radiant blush and long-lasting lipstick to make the princesses look dazzling. Do not forget about the traditional jewelry: nath, earrings and necklace. Complete the image of an Indian bride and help the princesses become the most beautiful on the holiday!

title: Transformers Battle For The City
description:
In this game you will find an open world where you will defend the city from the invasion of robots. If you are a fan of transformers, then you will definitely like this game. 
In the game you will find 7 full-fledged story tasks, the complexity of which will gradually increase. After receiving the task, you will go to the place of military operations, where you can use various super-techniques to destroy powerful robot villains.

title: Horror School Detective Story
description: Ready to enter a horror school full of scares and mysteries? In Horror School: Detective Story, you’ll play the role of a brave detective. Solve the mysteries layered on top of each other at the school. Each scene is tense and exciting, full of suspense and the unknown! Choose the complexity of the scenario to start your challenge.

title: Puzzles Balls Merge the New Year!
description: ● This New Year's game is more difficult than it might seem ?! You have a playing field? on which you need to throw balls and connect the same ones??! Until you get the biggest and most beautiful one?! Save up points?! Compete with friends and colleagues to become the best?! Enjoy your game?!

title: Connect Puzzle Image
description: Step into the delightful world of Connect Puzzle Image, a game designed to tease your brain and sharpen your observation skills. Match and connect a variety of funny characters, tasty foods, and interesting objects as you progress through colorful levels. Easy to play yet delightfully challenging, this free online puzzle game offers hours of relaxing entertainment on both mobile and desktop devices.

title: Wednesday Light Academia
description: Join the trend in Wednesday Light Academia - a fun, immersive makeover game for girls! Today you're becoming a super-talented stylist and your job is to transform Wednesday Addams from a dark e-girl look to a stunning girly-girl fashionista. Explore the fun realms of makeup, hairstyling, and fashion-forward wardrobe choices with this addictive game. Have fun!

title: Fish Out of Water!
description:
Dive into a thrilling adventure with Fish Out of Water, without ads or in-app purchases. A captivating game by Halfbrick Studios, the creators of Fruit Ninja and Jetpack Joyride. Launch a group of brave fish pals into the sky and over the ocean, helping them travel far and bounce as much as possible!

Experience remastered graphics and audio and enjoy a rebalanced crystal unlocking system for a more rewarding experience.

title: Chill Clicker
description: Chill Clicker is a clicker game where you multiply the Chill Capybara population by clicking. You can buy various upgrades to increase the output of Chill Capybaras, change the weather, and unlock new skins to make you the coolest Chill Capybara in town.

title: Solitaire Klondike: Eternal Russian Classic
description:
Rediscover the captivating world of Solitaire Klondike!

This timeless card game not only entertains but also enhances logical thinking, offering hours of engaging pastime. Play your favorite solitaire anytime, anywhere.

Join the community of enthusiasts and prove your mastery in Klondike!

Keep an eye on the leaderboard and become the top player among all!

title: Christmas Candy Escape 3D
description: Christmas Candy Escape 3D is a casual puzzle in which you have to fall safely. It is deceptively simple, yet profoundly deep. Play through the extensive stages, sharpening your wits as you have fun. Have a try!

title: City Bike Racing Champion
description: Let's ride some bikes in the Champions City with cool bikes against other riders or with your friend in the 2-player game mode in the City Bike Racing Champion game! Lots of bikes, bags, helmets, costumes, and many other customization options await you. Play either single or 2-player and have some fun in Champions City. Participate in races or ride on the huge free map and do some stunts. Let's ride!

title: 2048 Mayhem.io
description: Welcome to 2048 Mayhem.io! Combine the classic 2048 puzzle mechanics with thrilling .io snake survival gameplay. Collect cubes to grow your tail, merge identical numbers, and hunt down smaller players to become the biggest 2048 cube in the arena. Use your dash ability to escape danger or catch your prey. Can you reach 2048 and dominate the leaderboard?

title: Tropical Match 2
description: Tropical Match is back with its highly anticipated second sequel! Join your island friend Coco for a colorful Match 3 adventure in a lush tropical paradise. Match juicy fruits, vibrant flowers, and clear away algae and clouds across 1,250+ exciting levels. Complete Daily Missions and discover tropical treasures along the way! With relaxing island tunes and gorgeous scenery, this is the perfect summer escape. Dive in and start your tropical adventure today!

title: Tangled Snakes - Sort Puzzle
description:
Untangle all the tangled snakes in this fun and satisfying puzzle game!

Tangled Snakes – Sort Puzzle is a relaxing yet challenging brain teaser where you must sort and free the snakes from their tangled mess. Strategically move them in the correct order to clear each level and put your problem-solving skills to the test! Can you untangle them all?

Features:
Simple & intuitive controls!
Mind-teasing gameplay!
Hundreds of unique levels!
Endless fun for all ages!

title: Link Flow
description: Enter the mesmerizing world of Link Flow, where logic meets creativity in a captivating puzzle experience! In this minimalist yet visually stunning game, your goal is simple: connect the dots with seamless lines, recreating intricate patterns that test your problem-solving skills.

title: Push The Frog
description: Control your little frog to eat all the mosquitoes. Master the length of the frog's tongue and make the frog reach the appropriate position to eat the mosquitoes. Think carefully about planning the route. The game has a simple and interesting style, and the gameplay is educational and novel. It is very suitable for playing when killing time.

title: 2048 Match Balls
description: With super simple rules and addictive gameplay, this logic game offers endless fun while challenging your brain. Merge balls and level up. Each merge increases the value of the balls while also changing their color and size. Be smart and dive into a vibrant world of numbers!

title: Math Quest
description: "Math Quest" - an exciting game for the whole family that develops mathematical skills, logic, and reaction speed. Overcome challenges, calculate correct answers, and reach new levels!

title: Tip Tap!
description:
Get ready for a challenging and fun physics-based skill game where your goal is simple: move either the dynamic plate or the ball to reach the emoji smiley and complete the level without falling off the edge?

Key Features
-50+ skill-challenging levels that ramp up in difficulty as you progress
-Physics-based gameplay that tests your precision and timing
-Dynamic controls: move the plate or the ball to reach the goal

title: Stickman Santa
description: In Stickman Santa, Santa’s holiday mission hits a snag when a mischievous stickman makes off with all the presents! Help Santa choose the perfect way to teach the stickman a lesson and reclaim the stolen gifts.

title: Girly Puzzle
description: Place blocks on the grid to form vertical or horizontal rows. When no more blocks can be placed, the game is over. Collect items to increase Your Score!

title: The White Room 5
description: The White Room 5 is the fifth sequel of an adventure escape game with a cartoon art style. Find objects that can help you escape the room and use your logic to solve the puzzles. Good luck!

title: Trolley fun
description: Trains connect cities and carry goods, but bandits are constantly attacking them! Collect resources, upgrade your train to repel all attacks!

title: Parking Driver
description: Ever struggled to find a parking spot? In "Parking Driver," you'll face tricky parking challenges! From tight parallel parking to complex reverse maneuvers, you need precise control to avoid obstacles and park perfectly in the shortest time. The game features a realistic physics engine and diverse level designs, each testing your patience and skill. Come prove your driving prowess, unlock cool new cars, and conquer every parking lot!

title: Robots Gone Wild
description:
Robots Gone Wild is a thrilling survival game in a sci-fi world with captivating visuals and intense shooting mechanics. Your goal is to escape from rogue robots and destroy them while navigating through hazardous environments.

To survive, keep upgrading your character and weapons.
Improve your armor, and unlock powerful guns to fend off waves of increasingly powerful robots. 

Engage in exciting battles, and explore beautiful environments that immerse you in the chaos of a world gone wild.

title: Letters Match
description: Letters Match combines the best of the games you love. This is a mixture of matching games, word search and clearing the playing field. We took all these ingredients and spiced it up with exciting gameplay. If you like to stretch your brain with puzzles, then Letters Match is what you need!

title: Plants Vs Zombies War
description: Plants Vs Zombies War is based on the famous PC game called Plants VS Zombies. This tower-defense strategy game needs your plans to fight against 15 kinds of incoming zombies. You can check the consumption and attack of all of your 15 plants before the battle. Then the tutorial will show the basic rules and plants at Level 1. The more levels you complete, the more plants you can unlock. You could also unlock them from ads in advance.

title: Chill Girl Clicker
description: Chill Girl Clicker is a soothing, laid-back clicker game that’s perfect for unwinding and finding your zen. Just like its predecessor, Chill Girl Clicker, this game offers a serene and calming experience, but with a delightful twist: a charming girl as the main character, bringing a fresh and enchanting vibe to your screen.

title: Koko Loco Block Blast
description: Think fast, blast smart — can you beat your best score? Blast blocks, fit shapes, and outsmart the grid in this fast-paced puzzle challenge! Every move counts: clear space, chain combos, and keep the board from filling up. With smooth controls, colorful blocks, and quick rounds, it’s perfect for casual fun or deep strategy. Easy to pick up, hard to put down — how high can you climb the high score ladder?

title: Find 6 Differences – Spot the Hidden Changes!
description: Put your observation skills to the test in Find 6 Differences, a fun and relaxing puzzle game! With 20 unique levels, each featuring two nearly identical images, your goal is simple: find the 6 differences before time runs out! 20 challenging levels with beautifully designed images and engaging gameplay that sharpens your attention to detail. Hint system to help you when you're stuck.

title: Worm Out: Brain Teaser Games
description: An exciting online puzzle game, where you can solve interesting logical puzzles to save the juicy fruit from pesky pests. Worms completely naked! Which of them will become a beautiful butterfly, and who will go to the dungeon, you decide.

title: Solitaire Mahjong
description: This is Solitaire Mahjong at its best, offering a classic and elegant mahjong experience without any need to rush. Known as one of the top mahjong games, it features a beautifully traditional layout that fans of mahjong puzzles will love. With polished graphics, a soothing soundtrack, and no timer, Solitaire Mahjong invites you to enjoy each move at a relaxed pace, focusing purely on the pleasure of the game.

title: Bus Collect
description: The aim of the Bus Collect game is to collect the passengers waiting on the road by making the right directions and deliver them to the finish point. To do this, direct the roads the vehicle will follow with arrow signs. Try to reach high scores by carrying as many passengers as possible to the finish point.

title: Pumpking vs Mummy
description: Are you ready for a competitive game between the mummy and the pumpkin king on Halloween? Yes, someone has to win on Halloween! Team up with a friend and choose to be either the mummy or the pumpkin king. Collect as many flying pumpkins as you can! You can earn money by eating candies, and by gathering all the pumpkins, you can win the game. Catch the balloons and take them to the treasure chest. The one who collects and brings them back the fastest wins.

title: Run Friends
description:
'RUN FRIENDS' is a game where beautiful heroines run to save planets in danger. 
Rescue the various creatures (Friends) on each planet, threatened by the cosmic villain Vegapunk, and save the planets. 
Are you ready to run alongside these beautiful heroines?

title: Noob: Jailbreak 2
Tropical Match
description: Embark on a vibrant adventure in Tropical Match 3! Help Coco, your lively island guide, find fruits and other island gems in a tropical paradise. Match exotic fruits, uncover vibrant flowers and observe colourful exotic birds while enjoying the island adventure. The game features exciting levels and a relaxing island soundtrack! So what are you waiting for? Enjoy the tropical paradise adventure now!

title: Mind Games: Math Crosswords
description:
Mind Games: Math Crosswords is a game to improve your math skills. It is a great way to spend your time. 
The player's mission is to save the planet from extinction. The aliens have destroyed all the plants on the planet. However, humans have found a solution. Engineers have built ships that convert brain activity into life-giving energy to grow plants. By solving mathematical problems, you are contributing to the restoration of plants and the regeneration of our planet.

title: Obby Draw to Escape
description:
Have a blast in Obby illustrating your way to victory! Play the fun and relaxing casual game Draw to Escape and see if you can overcome the levels' issues using just your creativity.

You may earn money as you go through the levels, and you can earn even more coins when you reach the end of each level for every star you find. Things may vanish or explode and kill you, so be sure to check every level thoroughly.

title: The Best Warrior
description: In The Best Warrior, you start as a humble peasant with one goal—to become the greatest warrior in the kingdom. Train by clicking on dummies to build attack power, defeat enemies for gold, and unlock powerful skins to grow even faster. Face epic bosses, collect timed chest rewards, and rise through multiple levels. With nonstop action, upgrades, and progression, this free adventure clicker game lets you prove your strength with every tap. Start your journey now and become a legend!

title: Agents io
description:
Play Agents.io online! Eliminate other agents, grow your team, and dominate the arena in this free game.
Agents.io is a multiplayer action game where you control a lone agent and battle against others in an open arena. As you eliminate enemies, they join your team, allowing you to grow your squad and become stronger. The more agents you collect, the easier it is to dominate your opponents. Use smart tactics, avoid bigger squads, and climb to the top of the leaderboard!

title: Schoolboy Runaway: room escape
description: Step into the gripping adventure of Schoolboy Runaway: Room Escape, where strategy and mystery go hand in hand. A young schoolboy finds himself locked in a strange room, full of tricky puzzles and hidden clues. Help him think fast, solve each challenge, and escape before it’s too late. Play for free on both mobile and desktop and see if you can unravel the secrets of every room.

title: Robberies 3D
description:
Welcome to Robberies 3D, a fast-paced online shooter where you can don the mask of a real robber! Inspired by the legendary PAYDAY series, this game offers exciting gameplay: search for keys, break into vaults, use a drill, and steal whatever you can get your hands on.
Choose your style: engage in a loud battle with the police or operate stealthily like a shadow. But don't think it will be easy: each level is a test of your agility, strategy, and nerves.

title: House Deep Clean Sim
description:
House Deep Clean Sim is a home-themed cleaning game with a strong sense of experience. It has 9 scenes for you to clean, which are fence, sculpture, trampoline, pool, robot, fountain, ground,
car, and dining table. Not only does it have a rich scene, but it also has everything you need for a clean game, such as full 3D effects, resizable nozzle size, and the ability to move around at will.  Try it if you are interested. Have fun.

title: Soccer Snakes
description: Two wild, clumsy snakes competing in a soccer match is the perfect mix of humor, chaos, and sports. Play solo or share your keyboard with a friend and score some 'hiss-terical' fun with Soccer Snakes!

title: Ball Bunker: Sneaky Stacks
description: Ball Bunker: Sneaky Stacks is a fun physics puzzle where your goal is to keep the ball safe! Tap to drop shapes and stack them into a bunker. Rotate pieces to fill gaps, then release the enemy balls. If your bunker holds, you win — if the ball gets hit, you fail. Simple, clever, and addictive!

title: Pentaword
description: Guess the hidden five-letter word in just six tries! Use logic, spelling, and word skills in this brain teaser. Can you crack the Pentaword?

title: Alien Chase - Swing and Fly
description: Alien Chase - Swing and Fly is the wildest swinging game in town! Play as a superhero on vacation, caught in the middle of an alien invasion. With nothing but your grappling skills, swing between towering skyscrapers and outrun the relentless alien swarm. It’s fast, it’s frantic, and it’s an endless escape—how far can you swing?

title: Bark & Blast
description: Crash-land on a post-apocalyptic planet in Bark & Blast! Help a brave alien dog survive and escape in this thrilling 2D platformer action RPG. Test your aim, strategy, and courage in an epic adventure. Play now and conquer the challenges!

title: Sweet business of cats: cakes
description:
An exciting game in which you have to interact with a variety of objects, manage cells and create delicious cakes based on original recipes.
31 unique cakes!
6 ingredients that can be combined!
More than a 13 000 customers!

title: Flower Fairy Adventure Story
description: Welcome to Flower Fairy Adventure Story, a casual puzzle game that you can play for free. Flower Fairy lost her wings! Embark on an adventure where you solve each tiny jigsaw, dress up your girl in pretty clothes, and pave the way for the Flower Fairy. Practice your observation, logical thinking, and hands-on ability while enjoying the relaxing and captivating puzzle game.

title: Magic Forest - Merge the Secrets
description:
The Magic Forest is full of amazing little places!
Do you want to take a walk here?
Then hurry and start your journey!
And to make it even more fun, you’ll have company - Masha, a young girl who loves discovering new and mysterious things.
Even if it sometimes means sneaking away from Grandma and missing lunch.

title: Break Beat
description: Break Beat is a fast-paced and colorful brick-breaker game with a pixel art/neon aesthetic and an electronic music soundtrack.

title: Tiny Fighter - Unstoppable Run
description:
10 Levels of an exciting and action-packed game that brings player to a mysterious woods and castles. The game begins with a dramatic scenario in which a vampire has stolen the princess and the brave Tiny Knight is the only one who can save her.

As the princess is abducted, the Tiny Knight embarks on a quest to retrieve her by through dangerous woodlands and battle his way through the castle's maze. Along the journey, the knight must fight Orcs, Skeletons and win Dracula to save the princess!

title: Cannon Merge
description: Beat off waves of snow monsters, connect cannons to get more and more improved cannon models. Monsters are strong and there are a lot of them, they constantly attack. Upgrade the base and guns, defeat them all!

title: Police Car Line Driving
description: Police Car Line Driving is a cool and addictive 3D car-avoiding arcade game. You have to chase unauthorized vehicles and drive as far as you can for higher score records. Each vehicle will give you an extra 100 scores right away. You have to dodge the bombs, other vehicles will do the same. If you hit them, you will lose the game immediately. Your current score and best score will be shown on the settlement page. If you want to improve your current score, you can restart and try again.

title: Toka Boka Home Clean Up Design
description: A new family has just arrived in this town, and they're in desperate need of your assistance. This isn't just a helping hand mission; it's a home transformation and management simulator! You need to help them clean dust, clean the home, rearrange clothes, design the house, and repair damaged things.

title: Emerland Solitaire
description:
Welcome to the wonderful country of Emerland! 
     Dive deep into the world of magical tale where great mages battle for the Source of the ancient magic of the Cards! Explore mysterious lands accompanied by heroes that include a noble Knight, an Elven Archeress and a mystical Sorceress to defeat the malevolent Dark Master! 
     Solve puzzles and collect combinations to complete difficult and varied levels! Get rewards and find new assistants!

title: Hidden Object Farm Adventure
description: Play a fun hidden object game with 30 farm levels! each level, find 6 hidden things before time runs out. If you need help, use a hint! It's easy to play and full of colorful farm fun.

title: Mushroom Fever Match 3
description:
Immerse yourself in the magical forest with Mushroom Fever - Match 3! Bright and cheerful mushrooms replace traditional crystals, adding a fresh twist to the classic match-3 genre. This game will bring you hours of thrilling fun and bursts of excitement!

Match groups of three or more mushrooms, complete engaging tasks, and unlock new levels! Each level brings unique puzzles and fresh challenges. The more matches you make, the more points and bonuses you’ll earn!

title: Monster Collect Run
description:
Triump over enemies & you will be able to play as them. Which critter do you think is the best?

Run through levels collecting crystals & mighty projectiles. Unleash your ammo unto many fantastic beasts, that dare to challenge you.

title: Drop Bricks Breaker
description: Drop Bricks Breaker is an interesting casual puzzle game. You can relax yourself during play time. You only need to tap the screen to aim the bricks, then launch the ball. Isn't easy it? Come to try it now! Have a great time!

title: Emergency Jam
description: As you progress, encounter cars in 8 different colors, adding complexity to your strategy. Use powerful boosters to line up characters by color or shuffle vehicles, clearing the way more efficiently. Test your logic, think fast, and rescue passengers.

title: Makeup Fruits
description: In Makeup Fruits, give your favorite fruits a stunning makeover! Apply makeup, add accessories, and create fabulous fruit beauty icons. Choose from a variety of makeup options, including powder, lipstick, and eyelashes. Take a "selfie" of your creation and share it with friends! Earn gems to unlock even more fun items and keep the transformation going!

title: Rent out - Landlord Tycoon
description: In this captivating world of landlord games, you'll start with a modest property portfolio and a dream to become the ultimate real estate and house tycoon. Your goal is to buy, sell, and manage properties to maximize your profits and become a successful business and house tycoon in this rent game. Whether it's residential apartments, commercial complexes, or luxurious villas, it's your chance to be rich in this rent game.

title: Countryside Driving Quest
description: Immerse yourself in Countryside Driving Quest, a dynamic driving game that lets you explore picturesque rural landscapes with a variety of challenges to master. Navigate through charming country roads, test your parking skills in tight spots, and perfect your drifting on winding paths. Designed with realistic physics and stunning visuals, this game brings the peaceful yet thrilling experience of countryside driving right to your screen.

title: Uphill Rush 13
description: Introducing the new, thirteenth game in the Uphill Rush series, and this time in a new setting - a Water Park! Dive into (pun intended) the atmosphere of water fun, riding different types of tubes, surfboards and even jet skis! Unlock new power-ups and skins by overcoming obstacles, such as loops and long jumps. But don't be scared of them, they are your best friends when it comes to stunts, which give you bonuses! Not to mention, make you look insanely cool.

title: Blockapolypse Zombie Shooter
description: Blockapolypse: Zombie Shooter is a defense shooting simulation game with 3D pixel undead creatures. To defend this position, you need to use weapons to defend incoming zombies from 3 directions. After you kill all zombies, you still need to defeat a giant undead creature. As long as you lose all of your HP, you will lose the game. When you earn enough gold coins, you can buy better weapons in the gun shop. Good luck and survive!

title: Block Sniper
description:
Pixelated sniper action game where you have to complete various missions in a blocky world. 
Game where you are a sniper who performs various missions in a block-based world.

title: Cougar Simulator: Big Cats
description: Experience life as a powerful cougar in a vast open world! Customize your big cat’s appearance, find a mate, and raise a family that aids in hunting and battles. Level up your skills, complete quests, and compete against other felines. Explore diverse environments filled with various animals, from farm creatures to fierce predators. Hunt, survive, and prove your strength in this immersive wild adventure!

title: Troll The Teacher
description:
Laugh and prank the teacher in this fun school game!

Have you ever dreamed of playing a prank on your teacher? Now you have a chance! In this game, you will become a student who arranges funny pranks right during the lesson. Use the most unexpected "tools", upgrade them and watch the funny reactions of the teacher!

title: Mecha Duel
description:
Crazy about robot fighting games? Wanna fight robots on the mech arena? This Mecha Duel game will not let you down. Your robot has to defeat real steel enemies in a mech arena. It’s hard to survive.
Upgrade your hero to defeat war robots. Unleash fighting attacks in one-on-one robot battle with simple gameplay.

title: Bubble Game 3D
description: Get ready for bubble-popping fun in Bubble Game 3D, a super cool version of the original classic Bubble Shooter game, now with amazing 3D graphics. Aim, match, and pop colorful bubbles in a world that looks like it’s coming right out of the screen. This is Bubble Shooter 3D like you’ve never seen before!

title: Sum Master
description: Sum Master is an engaging and challenging number puzzle game designed to enhance your mental arithmetic and logical reasoning skills. The objective is to select numbers within a grid so that the sums of each row, column, and colored region match the specified targets. Each puzzle has a unique solution, requiring players to carefully consider which numbers to include or exclude. The game offers a stimulating experience that combines fun with educational value.

title: Jigsaw Cards: Daily Puzzles
description:
Jigsaw Cards: Daily Puzzles is a relaxing jigsaw-style puzzle game where you assemble beautiful images piece by piece. Enjoy a calming experience as each picture comes to life under your fingertips!
Who It's For
Ideal for puzzle lovers, casual players, and anyone who enjoys peaceful, visually pleasing gameplay.
Start assembling now with Jigsaw Cards: Daily Puzzles — discover a cozy world of delightful puzzles!

title: Obby Climb Racing
description: In the adventure game Obby Climb Racing, players may spend a lot of time racing on insane roads, acquiring interesting skins, improving Obby's bike, and completing difficult parkour courses. For fans of fast-paced, skill-based games, this is a must-play because of the thrilling combination of racing, platforming, and character advancement. In this adrenaline-pumping game, you'll have to crank your engines, level up your character, and complete parkour tasks.

title: Monster Arena
description: Be the longest monster ever! Beat out your rival monsters by eating fruits and grows. This snake io game let you roam free, grow large, and finish your enemies by making them crash into you. Be the king of the island!

title: Devil Dash
description: Level Devil Dash is ready to break the ultimate limit within your inner demon rage! Prepare for a hellish journey that demands top-notch improvisation skills and extreme patience. You will embark on an adventure through interconnected worlds, tightly linked to one another.

title: Put the fruit together!
description: A game in the genre of "Connect the Balls" and "2048". Stack identical fruits to combine them into a new larger fruit! The game has incredibly beautiful and cute graphics, nice music accompaniment and addictive gameplay!

title: Halloween Match Trio
description: Halloween Match Trio is a classic match-3 puzzle game with fun challenges. Swap items to make a line of three or more matching items, horizontally or vertically. Keep matching to unlock all tiles and reach the final stage. Use power-ups like bombs, arrows, magnets, and more to clear levels faster. Complete all 75 levels to win the game!

title: Ultimate Brainrot Clicker
description:
Tap into chaos. Click your way to the final meme singularity.

Ultimate Brainrot Clicker is a chaotic, high-speed clicker-incremental game set in a futuristic memeverse where AI-generated absurdity and Italian brainrot collide. Your mission? Click endlessly to generate Neural Coins, unlock absurd characters, and witness the full meltdown of meme logic.

title: Block Cut Cleaner
description: An original block puzzle where the field is filled with triangle blocks! Pull out your shapes and place them on the field to clear at 100%. But be careful: each piece you place can create new blocks! Use smart boosters to turn the tide: refresh your inventory, remove three random triangles or place a "clean" square that doesn't leave blocks behind. Plan your strategy to clear the board completely!

title: Backflip Master
description: Backflip Master is the most popular in sports' game. The main test of the player's mastery of backflips and skills. You need to backflip to reach the finished line. Of course, there will be some obstacles on the way, you must also flip over. So, are you ready to challenge this game now? Come on!

title: Super Hero Tycoon
description: Build your superhero empire and dominate the battlefield! In Super Hero Tycoon, choose from iconic heroes like Iron Man, Spider-Man, or The Hulk, and construct your base to generate income, unlock powerful gear, and engage in thrilling PvP combat. With over 2 billion visits, this game offers an immersive experience for fans of superheroes and tycoon-style gameplay.

title: Blob Hero
description: In Blob Hero, you become a brave hero facing endless waves of enemies and monsters! This survival game offers a true rogue adventure experience. You control a blob hero, choose basic skills and upgrade to survive.

title: Slime Farm!
description: Farm Slime: Slime Farm Simulator is a relaxing yet addictive game where you drive a suction truck to vacuum up unruly slimes and turn them into cash. Cruise smoothly through gooey fields, slurp with satisfying precision, sell your haul to upgrade your truck and expand your farm into a thriving slime empire.

title: Snake Puzzle: Slither to Eat!
description: Snake Puzzle: Slither to Eat is an exciting and relaxing puzzle game that will test your strategic thinking and planning skills!

title: Bubble Sky
description: Bubble Sky is an ascending Bubble Shooter game that will take you to dizzying heights. Will you be able to reach space? Reach a score of 200000 points to unlock the wheel of fortune and win collectible cards to complete your album!

title: Sudoku Master
description: Sudoku by in8finity is a classic puzzle game with a sleek dark theme, offering a smooth and enjoyable experience. Flexible settings let you adjust the difficulty to match your skill level. With intuitive controls and eye-friendly visuals, you can focus on solving puzzles without distractions. More than just a game, Sudoku trains logic, concentration, and memory. Challenge yourself and enjoy relaxing, distraction-free gameplay!

title: Delivery Now
description:
Delivery Now is an open world endless delivery game , which uses spectacular graphics and amazing audio effects to give a breathtaking game play experience.

Delivery Now is a fast paced action and racing game in which you will have to race against time to deliver these cute things, making your way through city highway traffic racers. You can make your own path towards your goal.

Let's enjoy it. What are you waiting for?

title: Marble Run - Ultimate Race!
description:
Race, roll, and clash in Marble Run, the ultimate marble racing game! Guide your marble through physics-based tracks, dodge obstacles, knock rivals off the edge, and aim for the finish line. 

With fast-paced races, competitive knockout rounds, and fun marble skins, it’s the most addictive 3D marble runner you’ll play!

title: Farm Animal Sort Puzzle
description: Welcome to Farm Animal Sort Puzzle, a fun and relaxing casual puzzle game set on a lively farm. Your mission is simple but addictive: match the appropriate animal or vegetable to the customer's needs. Sort adorable farm animals into the correct spaces and enjoy the satisfying challenge of smart organization.

title: Pimple Squeeze
description: Dive into ASMR Pimple Pop, the ultimate stress-relief pimple popping game for casual fun! Squeeze, pop, and zap blackheads and pimples with satisfying ASMR sounds and juicy visuals. Enjoy quick arcade-style levels with combo bonuses and quirky faces to clean up. With smooth controls and gross-fun charm, this pimple pop arcade delivers unmatched satisfaction. Ready to pop? Download now and embrace the oddly addictive experience!

title: Chibi Doll Coloring & Dress Up
description:
Chibi avatar character creator: anime coloring book and dress up games for girls
First chibi dolls coloring book: meet the most customizable Anime Avatar Maker! Color pictures, become a real doll designer, create and makeover adorable anime characters with baby doll dress up games for girls and glitter coloring pages! (✧∀✧)/

title: Playground- Parkour
description: Jump and break bones, destroy enemies and unlock new levels! Ragdoll physics is what you need for parkour lovers. Train, participate in the battle and upgrade your hero! You will enjoy the game if you are a lover of the playground and stick games. Run, jump and maim the heroes. Ragdoll-style physics is what you love. Deals damage and unlock new levels! Stick and Ragdoll fans will be happy.

title: Dirty Money The Rich Get Rich
description: Dirty Money: The Rich Get Rich is a money clicker relaxation game. You are permitted to make money by tapping. When you earn some money and level up on the corresponding level, you can speed up by upgrading in the Growth, using the Invest, and making the Assets. The more money you make, the more functions you can unlock and use. I hope you will complete the target and make 100 million!

title: Obby The Legendary Dragon
description:
Experience the thrill of an addictive pet-catching simulator, perfect for Pokémon fans! Explore diverse Roblox worlds and level up your heroes all in one exciting adventure.
Gather health, upgrade your hero, and unlock incredible new worlds to discover. Catch pets in battles, hatch them from cases and eggs, and trade or purchase them to build a team of powerful allies and friends. Earn money, climb the ranks, and enhance your Obby character with prestigious titles and upgrades!

title: Card Quest: 10 Minute Adventure
description: Embark on an exhilarating journey with Card Quest: 10 Minute Adventure, where quick thinking and strategy collide in an exciting online card challenge. Build your deck, make smart moves, and face thrilling encounters that test your skills and timing. Designed for both desktop and mobile players, this free-to-play adventure delivers fast, tactical gameplay and endless replayability. Every decision shapes your path — can you conquer the quest in just ten minutes?

title: Bubble Shooter Free 3
description: Bubble Shooter Free 3 is back with a long-awaited 3rd sequel to one of the most popular bubble shooter games there is! This bubble shooter embraces endless gameplay that is designed for players to enjoy hours and hours of fun without time pressure. It boasts the ‘Bubble Swap’ feature which lets you swap the current bubble in your shooter with the incoming one as well as the BOMB which creates huge explosions popping 15 bubbles at once! Now the players can play even more strategically!

title: VegaMix Match-3 Village
description: A cozy match-3 with a heartfelt story! ? Visit grandma in the village — she’s a true star with fun tales from her youth. Play classic match-3 levels, earn stars and complete quests for villagers. Bright puzzles, touching stories, colorful graphics and daily bonuses await you. Perfect for short sessions and relaxing breaks. ? For fans of match-3 with plot, coziness and helping heroes.

title: Spaceflight Simulator
description: Do you have a space dream? Spaceflight Simulator is a challenging spaceflight simulation game suitable for boys who love to build and launch rockets. The game has real-life conditions in space.

title: Fish Shooting Fish Hunter
description: Want to begin a fun and relaxing fishing adventure? In Fish Shooting - Fish Hunter, you’ll become a fishing master. Use your skills and quick reflexes to catch various fish while enjoying a laid-back casual experience!

title: Block Eating Simulator
description: The battle of the blocks begins in the block's arena with this great eating simulator game. Eat blocks around and grow your cube. Become the biggest block of the arena. Find various cube skins. Play single or 2 player! Cube players are all around the arena and they are eating blocks, cubes, and lower-scored players. Each block you eat will give you some points. Try to eat as many blocks as possible and try to eat low-scored players. Try to get to the top of the leaderboard.

title: Syder Hyper Drive
description: Syder Hyper Drive is stunt car game, based on futuristic theme. Perform different stunts from varieties of available vehicles, complete missions in this endless game.

title: Stack Up
description: Stack Up is a vibrant puzzle game where strategy meets fun. Connect stacks of the same color to form long chains, reach level goals, and climb through increasingly challenging puzzles. With colorful visuals, smooth gameplay, and intuitive controls, Stack Up offers an addictive experience for players of all ages.

title: Lovie Chic's Coachella Festival
description: Step into the vibrant world of Lovie Chic’s Coachella Festival, the ultimate festival dress-up game! Style your character with trendy outfits, accessories, and makeup to shine at the iconic Coachella Festival. With simple controls and endless creativity, Lovie Chic’s Coachella Festival is perfect for quick fun or long gaming sessions.

title: Hotel Fever Tycoon
description: Wanna be a Hotel Empire Tycoon or a Top Cooking Chef? Come to "Hotel Fever Tycoon" to start an interesting hotel management and cooking journey with Emma and Uncle George! Work together to build your world-class hotel chain!

title: Grandma Recipe Ramen
description: It's time to serve a delicious Ramen! Ask grandma for the recipe. Prepare the tools and gather the ingredients. Mix the ingredients perfectly, then decorate the Ramen. Keep following grandma's instructions to finish making the Ramen! Don't forget to dress up in various cute costumes. Making Ramen has never been more fun!

title: Match Find 3D
description:
Are you a master player of finding games?Do you enjoy matching puzzle games?Come to challenge this addictive puzzle game - Match Find 3D!
Unique gameplay, a combination of collecting and matching, and well-designed levels that will keep you entertained.

title: Emoji Frenzy
description:
Test your reflexes and knowledge in this fast-paced emoji matching game! 
Tap the correct emoji before time runs out, build streaks, and unlock new themes. Simple to play, hard to master!

title: Night Club Security
description:
Immerse yourself in the unique atmosphere of a security guard simulator inspired by the cult game I'm Security.

Check visitors for prohibited items, decide who is worthy of entry and who is not. Your power is absolute, because you are an unlimited security guard! Use your imagination to have fun and unusual "entertainment" with visitors, leaving them without things or even with a couple of bruises. Everything that happens is in your hands.

title: Mermaidcore Makeup
description: In Mermaidcore Makeup, you ladies can step into the shoes of a talented makeup artist and work your magic on three stunning ladies. Journey into the realm of fantasy as you help these beauties achieve their perfect, enchanting looks. Prepare for a sensational trip filled with endless options as you explore an extensive selection of hairstyles, eyeshadows, mascara, lipsticks, face patterns, and intricate shoulder and neck patterns that perfectly match each girl's unique style and personality.

title: Falling Man
description:
Fall for fun in this addictive hypercasual game!
Ready for a wild ride? Join the thief as he falls from dizzying heights, dodging obstacles and collecting coins in this addictive hypercasual game. With two distinct locations to explore and endless possibilities for high scores, the fun never ends in this exciting game.

title: Bus Driver
description: Being a bus driver is tough! Navigate carefully through traffic, pick up passengers, and avoid collisions. Think you have what it takes to master the roads?

title: Organizer master
description: An engaging 3D puzzle with numerous levels. Find pairs and arrange objects so that everything fits. Develop spatial thinking and solve challenges. Enjoy high-quality 3D graphics in this captivating browser puzzle game.

title: Forest Glade Mysteries
description: Immerse yourself in the world of Forest Glade Mysteries — a magical forest where the cutest animals live! Each level introduces you to new fluffy friends and exciting challenges. This forest is full of mysteries, and every step brings you closer to uncovering ancient secrets!

title: Oil Digging
description: Oil Digging is a simulation game where you build and operate an oil rig. This game offers the experience of oil mining without the morning smell of oil! Dive into the world of oil drilling. Will your oil operation be a profitable masterpiece or an expensive mess? Start by finding an oil well, drilling it, and then building an efficient pipe system. Let's see if you can get rich!

title: Container Sort Puzzle
description:
Container Sort Puzzle - Sort All the Cargo!
Get ready to test your brain with Container Sort Puzzle, the ultimate cargo-sorting challenge! Load the right containers onto the right ships and become a port master!
Perfect for fans of sort games, stacking puzzles, and logic-based challenges. Whether you're a casual player or a seasoned puzzler, Container Sort Puzzle will keep your brain sharp and entertained.

title: Br Br Patapim: Obby Challenge
description: Br Br Patapim: Obby Challenge is a wild meme-fueled obby game where you’ll jump, fall, and laugh your way through chaos! Inspired by the viral spirit of Italian Brainrot Animals of TikTok trends, this game turns parkour madness into pure comedy. Take control of the legendary Brr Brr Patapim and conquer ridiculous levels full of traps, platforms, and meme-powered surprises.

title: Dungeon Master – Cult & Craft
description: Immerse yourself in the atmosphere of a mysterious dungeon, where you are its keeper and master! Turn simple stickmen into devoted followers capable of mining ore and creating value for your dark empire. Develop the Cult, manage resources and expand the boundaries of your underground Universe!

title: Ship Out
description: The harbor’s a mess! Ships of all sizes and colors are stuck in a massive jam. Pay attention to their direction, plan your moves, and clear the chaos! Need help? Use special power-ups to sail through tougher levels.

title: Stickman vs Zombies WorldCraft
description:
Stickman vs Zombies WorldCraft is an action and adventure platform game in which you can play as a brave stick ninja. As your stickman hero, your mission is to wipe all the craft zombies. Along the way, you'll find money that you may use to unlock cool new skins.

Navigate the map in search of zombies before they track you down and rush you or open fire on you. Keep going, for the zombie craft will attempt to catch you if you leave even one alive.

title: Sudoku Guru - classic sudoku
description:
Develop your logic and train your brain in "Sudoku Guru - Classic Sudoku"!
Enjoy Sudoku, solve daily challenges and get trophies for completing tasks.

There are 5 different difficulty levels available to you: easy, medium, difficult, expert and guru. Each level is a unique puzzle.
Track your progress and challenge yourself with the statistics report. This feature adds a competitive element to the game, motivating you to become a real guru.

title: Clownfish Pin Out
description: Clownfish Pin Out is an interesting and cute puzzle game, you need to help one little fish escape from a dangerous place. Tap the pin to make the waterfall to the fish and avoid the lava. Think before you move, or you will lose. Come on!

title: Emoji Sort – Fun Puzzle Game
description:
Emoji Sort is a fun and addictive sorting puzzle game where you match and organize cute emojis into the right tubes! Test your logic, plan your moves carefully, and enjoy hundreds of relaxing levels. Simple to play yet hard to master — perfect for puzzle lovers and casual gamers alike.

Play now and see if you can complete every emoji challenge!

Features: smooth animations, colorful visuals, satisfying gameplay, and brain-teasing fun made for everyone!

title: Hidden Objects
description: Hidden Objects is a visually stunning puzzle game that challenges your observation skills. Explore beautifully detailed scenes filled with cleverly hidden items. Use hints if needed, but the real reward lies in uncovering every object on your own. Dive into a world of mystery and sharpen your perception.

title: Doggi
description:
The Doggi is Adventure with Hidden Objects and Puzzles. Easy controls, simple game mechanics. Play to kill time and relax. The game doesn't require a super force and ability. This game won't bring you to hell and make you sweat. The game has hints.
The game performs in the genre of finding hidden objects with puzzles. The game has nice hand-drawn graphics. The player needs to help a little dog named Doggi collect all the hidden bones.

title: Max Crusher 2 - Destruction, Drift, and Racing!
description: Get ready for unbridled automotive chaos in Max Crusher 2 - Destruction, Drift, and Racing!– a game where the three elements of extreme driving merge: devastating crash tests, masterful drifting, and frantic racing!

title: Sorting Candy Factory
description: A great puzzle game in the sorting genre. At the candy factory, all the candies are mixed up, sort the candies into flasks so that they can be packed and shipped according to orders. The game has many levels with increasing difficulty!

title: The Drag Racing Challenge
description: Welcome to The Drag Racing Challenge game, an exciting new arcade racing game! Race through challenging missions, unlock and upgrade over 12 cars, and compete against opponents with customizable vehicles. Test your skills in realistic maps across five cities and enjoy smooth, high-quality racing. No fuel or time limits—just endless drag racing fun!

title: Bingo Halloween
description: A Halloween-themed bingo game where you can win exciting bingos to unlock spooky candy-themed images. Enjoy multiple call speeds and progressive unlocks.

title: Stack n Sort
description:
Welcome to Stack n Sort, the ultimate color stack game that combines precision, hoop sort strategy, and excitement in one addictive experience.

Immerse yourself in a world of vibrant stack color and dynamic hoop sort challenges as you test your skills and aim for high scores. Whether you’re a casual gamer or a competitive enthusiast, hoop stack offers endless fun and engagement.

title: We Will Not Survive
description: Survive the apocalypse in We Will Not Survive, an idle tower defense game! Upgrade weapons, harvest resources, and fight relentless zombie waves to protect your base. Are you ready to defend and thrive?

title: Warfront
description: Warfront is a combat simulator for pro gamers inspired by CS, Standoff, and Valorant. Dive into the world of competitive FPS, testing your shooting and tactical skills across various levels. Assemble teams, improve your abilities, and upgrade your character to dominate in shooter eSports. Experience the thrill of classic CS and Valorant-style gameplay. Ready to become a counter master and a standoff legend? Prove it in Warfront!

title: Dessert DIY
description: Step into a sweet little food studio and craft desserts for hungry customers! Follow simple step-by-step recipes, pick the right ingredients, and assemble tasty treats exactly as requested. Satisfy each guest to earn coins, then spend your rewards in the shop to unlock more items, upgrades, and delicious options. Easy to learn, relaxing to play, and full of colorful desserts!

title: Sky Balls 3D
description: Sky Balls 3D invites you on an adventure as you travel through the sky with rolling balls and test your reaction skills. Keep the ball on the track without letting it fall and watch out for obstacles, traps and gaps! Collect coins and keys along the way to get new ball skins and sky-boxes. You can play the game in 1 player and 2 player modes.

title: Cat Evolution
description:
Embark on a paws-itively thrilling journey of discovery and creativity in Cat Evolution! Combine adorable cats to unlock hilarious and surprising new species. From cuddly kittens to fantastical hybrids, every merge brings you closer to unveiling the ultimate evolution.

Merge & Unlock Cats Evolutions. 
Build Your Cat Universe!

title: Brain Challenge
description:
This game will challenge your mind, think out of the box
Unexpected and mind-blowing answers will amaze you
250 Fun levels.

Features:
- Solve fun & mind-challenging puzzles
- Think out of the box
- Simple & addictive gameplay

** Credits:
"Ukulele"
"Royalty Free Music from Bensound"

"Forest" & "calm-bgm"
Music by "BandCamp - syncopika"

Menu vector created by jcomp - www.freepik.com
Menu vector created by upklyak - www.freepik.com

title: Fidget Trading Card Toy
description: Fidget Trading Card Toy is a fidget trading game that allows you to feel the fun of collecting toy cards! In the game, you will flip cards against opponents and even use the slap feature to set off a fierce trading duel! Your goal is to collect as many rare cards as possible, increase your card collection, and gain more advantages in trading!

title: Elemental DressUp Magic
description: Welcome to the fascinating world of natural elements and magic! The main characters of the game are already waiting for you - five beautiful girls representing various elements: fire, water, earth and air. The makeup and outfit of each of these girls is inspired by the element that she represents. The fifth heroine is special. This girl is an Avatar that combines all four elements!

title: Mahjong connect tiles
description: Mahjong Connect Tiles is a classic tile-matching puzzle game. We have combined the authentic charm of the traditional Mahjong Solitaire with modern convenience to create the perfect game for seniors and puzzle lovers of all ages. If you are looking for a relaxing yet intellectually engaging way to spend your time, this game is designed for you.

title: Classic Labyrinth 3d Maze
description:
Classic Labyrinth 3d - The wooden maze funny game with the steel ball everyone knows comes to your browser! Enjoy this classic marble maze labyrinth.  
     
Features:
- Accurate ball physic simulation
- Joystick Controler
- Smooth ball movement
- Personal highscores
- 3 Star rating system
- One coin per 3 Star finished level
- Realistic sounds
- Coins to continue, if you fail during the level.

title: Happy Jump
description: Bounce into blissful heights with Happy Jump! Guide the cute chicken on its springy pogo to leap skyward amid lush trees and fun obstacles. Smash your personal best, snag stars, and chase trophies in this addictive, one-tap thrill. Endless jumps, soaring scores—pure joy awaits!

title: Wild West Match
description: Embark on a captivating Wild West adventure with Bonnie! Explore iconic landscapes, face challenges, and uncover secrets in this thrilling journey. The frontier spirit awaits – join Bonnie on the quest for an unforgettable adventure!

title: Tales of Lagoona
description: Embark on a magical Hidden Object adventure beneath the waves! In Coral Bay, the New Anemone Orphanage is in danger of closing – only you can save it. Search beautiful underwater scenes for hidden treasures, sell your finds at the market, upgrade the orphanage, play 160 mini-games, and take on quests from the townsfolk. Join Islabelle the Mermaid in a heartwarming quest to rescue the orphans!
